title: Staff Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Visa’s Technology Organization is a community of problem solvers and innovators reshaping the future of commerce.   We operate the world’s most sophisticated processing networks capable of handling more than 65k secure transactions a second across 80M merchants, 15k Financial Institutions, and billions of everyday people.   While working with us, you’ll get to work on complex distributed systems and solve massive scale problems centered on new payment flows, business and data solutions, cyber security, and B2C platforms.
   

  

 Visa Open Banking
   

  

 Tink, A Visa Solution, is a market-leading payment services and data enrichment platform, serving some of the world’s largest financial institutions. Tink provides payments, banking, and lending solutions that power the new world of finance – whether that’s initiating account-to-account payments, onboarding new users, making better risk decisions or creating engaging money management tools.
   

  

 A wholly owned subsidiary of Visa, Tink was founded in Stockholm in 2012 as a pioneer of open banking. Today, Tink and Visa’s open banking solutions are present in 20 markets, with 13,000 connections to financial institutions. Tink enables its partners to offer data-driven experiences that help eliminate complexity for millions of consumers across the globe.
   

  

 Today the Tink platform is built and managed by Visa Open Banking.
   

  

 The Opportunity:
   

  

 We are looking for talented, curious, and energetic Software Engineers who embrace solving complex challenges on a global scale.  As a Visa Software Engineer, you will be an integral part of a cross-functional development team inventing, designing, building, and testing software products that reach a truly global customer base. While building components of cutting-edge payment technology, you will get to see your efforts shaping the digital future of monetary transactions.
   

  

 The Work itself:
   

  

* Design code and systems that touch 40% of the world population while influencing Visa’s internal standards for scalability, security, and reusability
* Collaborate cross-functionally to create design artifacts and develop best-in-class software solutions for multiple Visa technical offerings
* Actively contribute to product quality improvements, value added service technology, and new business flows in diverse agile squads
* Develop robust and scalable products intended for a myriad of customers including end-user merchants, b2b, and business to government solutions
* Leverage innovative technologies to build the next generation of Payment Services, Transaction Platforms, Real-Time Payments, and Buy Now Pay Later Technology
* Opportunities to make a difference on a global or local scale through mentorship and continued learning opportunities


**Essential Functions**
* Works alongside others to implement modifications to existing software code that complies with design specifications and meets security best practices.
* Assists with improvements to systems and tools and supports development and implementation of new automation, asking questions as necessary.
* Engages with team members and manager during code/design reviews, participates in on-call rotations and incident responses throughout product development and operations cycles.
* Leverages working knowledge of systems/platforms and telemetry analyses to identify basic issues in code, processes, and designs when they are inconsistent with customer/business objectives.


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications  :
   

  

* Master's degree in Math, Science, Engineering, or Computer Science, Information Systems or related field OR Bachelor's degree in Math, Science, Engineering, or Computer Science, Information Systems or related field


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Knowledge of and ability to develop back-end (e.g. Python, Java, C++, PHP) code in support of package and product development. This includes the extension of capabilities of packages and products.
* The ability to develop and utilize Application Program Interfaces (APIs), a set of routines, protocols, and tools for building software applications that specify how software components should interact and are used when programming graphical user interface (GUI) components. An API may be for a web-based system, operating system, database system, computer hardware, or software library.
* Knowledge of and the ability to use database software (e.g., applications, web-based applications, information systems) to maintain, modify, and output data.
* Knowledge of systems integration process in which separately produced components or subsystems are combined and problems in their interactions are addressed.
* Knowledge of data structures, which consist of data organization, management, and storage formats that enable efficient access and modifications. This includes a collection of data values, the relationships among them, and the functions or operations that can be applied to the data.


 The Skills You Bring:
   

  

* Energy and Experience: A growth mindset that is curious and passionate about technologies and enjoys challenging projects on a global scale
* Challenge the Status Quo: Comfort in pushing the boundaries, “hacking” beyond traditional solutions
* Language Expertise: Expertise in one or more general development languages (e.g., Java, C#, C++)
* Builder: Experience building and deploying modern services and web applications with quality and scalability
* Learner: Constant drive to learn new technologies such as Angular, React, Kubernetes, Docker, etc.
* Partnership: Experience collaborating with Product, Test, Dev-ops, and Agile/Scrum teams


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: AI Engineer, Solna
description:
We seek to strengthen our position and increase the speed of the implementation of AI solutions in PostNord. We are looking for two AI Engineers who will play an important role in helping PostNord to become an AI and data driven business. We offer you a cutting edge Analytics environment and very competent colleagues. Apply now!
   

  

**Join us**
 The Technology Acceleration area within Group IT is responsible for establishing the future IT landscape. This will be the foundation for PostNord' s continued AI and data driven journey. As an AI Engineer your focus will be to answer business challenges using AI in software. In the AI team you will work in an experimental fashion with new AI technologies. You will develop POC’s and MVP’s into enterprise solutions. Our vision is to drastically increase development speed by creating AI Agent Factories to augment the AI Engineers in their work.
   

  

**Job Duties**
* Understand the business requirements and develop AI services accordingly.
* Develop AI services and collaborate closely with our data platform- and domain teams.
* Help design reusable patterns for AI-assisted software development.
* Explain AI systems to project managers and stakeholders.
* Keep up to date on the latest AI technologies.
* Train team members and business stakeholders on the implementation of AI solutions.
* Locate and analyze the relevant data to enable the creation of new AI services.
* Work with the rest of the team to improve communication, collaboration, and deliveries with other teams and stakeholders.
* Document and explain the solutions you produce.
* Worked as a Fullstack Developer in a data heavy domain for at least three years
* Prior experience working with generative AI/LLM’s or ML.
* Understands the benefits of using agentic coding to complement the traditional software engineering
* Proficiency in using Claude Code or similar tools to generate code
* Proficiency in programming languages like Python, Typescript/NodeJS and SQL
* Good understanding of core cloud concepts - Azure data storage, Azure compute, data connections, CI/CD and APIs
* Containers, CI/CD, and isolated execution environments


**Meritorious Experience**
* Awareness of legal and ethical considerations in AI, including data privacy, bias and fairness, transparency, and accountability.
* Good communication, collaboration and problem-solving skills
* Creativity, curiosity, and passion for artificial intelligence
* Experience with agentic workflows or AI orchestration
* Experience with evaluation frameworks, scenario testing, or benchmark design
* Proficiency in UI libraries like React or Streamlit
* Proficiency in agentic AI libraries such as Langchain, PydanticAI, Semantic Kernel
* Proficiency in ML libraries such as Scikit-learn and PyTorch
* Cloud literacy - PostNord's data platform is based on Databricks and hosted in Azure
* Experience working with various RAG frameworks
* Want to help shape how AI is used in a modern engineering organization


**Language Requirement**
 Fluent English in speech and writing. Proficiency in at least one Scandinavian language is meritorious.
   

  

**Why this role matters**
 This is an opportunity to help define how AI is used in engineering in a way that is practical, scalable, and grounded in real delivery needs. You will help move us from experimentation toward repeatable ways of working that teams can trust.
   

  

 You will need a collaborative delivery approach to be successful as AI Engineer. As an AI Engineer you will cooperate with stakeholders from the business, as well as with our product owner, and line managers.
   

  

**Your profile as an AI Engineer**
 You have worked with AI solutions in an agile team before. You like to work hands on, and to work directly with business stakeholders. You have an academic background and as a person you are curious to learn and evolve your skill set in accordance with the state-of-the-art pace in the domain that you work in.
   

  

**We offer you**
**Benefits**
 We offer you a flexible hybrid workplace with a prestige-free environment where we as a team help each other to reach our goals. We encourage self-sufficient leadership for development and career opportunities. In addition to the benefits mentioned above, we offer:
   

  

* Work in a Nordic/International and flexible environment.
* Good insurance and occupational pension conditions
* Wellness allowance & access to office gym and swimming pool
* Employee benefits through PostNord's own employee foundation PostNord Plus
* Employment according to a collective agreement.


**We make everyday life easier**
 PostNord is the leading supplier of communication and logistics solutions in the Nordic region, providing postal services to households and businesses in Sweden and Denmark. We aim to make everyday life easier and more sustainable. We value accountability, bravery, and commitment, and emphasize teamwork, sincerity, and positive relationships. Our diverse workplace contributes to better business results. Visit us at postnord.com
   

  

**Apply**
 We look forward to receiving your application! If you have any questions or concerns, you are welcome to contact Christian Mejlvang, Christian.mejlvang@postnord.com

title: Software Developer, Cybersecurity Lead (Embedded & Edge)
description:
*BROMMA is a division of Kalmar, operating under its own brand. BROMMA has been the leading manufacturer of crane spreaders ever since its formation in the 1960s. Today we have, by far, the highest market share of the world’s spreader suppliers. Today, our spreaders are currently in use in 99 of the top-100 ports worldwide.*
*BROMMA sales and service network has a wide-reaching footprint. We are present with own sales offices on all continents, and with an extensive network of agents, we are able to support customers in every country in the world.*
*More information about BROMMA can be found on www.bromma.com*
**Join us and take your career to the next level**
 As our
 **Cybersecurity Lead** 
 , you will be the heart of our security vision and a key mentor for our technical community. We are looking for a collaborative leader to guide our transition toward safety and compliance, ensuring our codebases and
 **Edge devices** 
 are built with care and resilience. This hybrid role is perfect for someone who enjoys bridging the gap between thoughtful embedded engineering and the evolving European legal landscape—nurturing the standards our developers follow while staying hands-on to help bring our solutions to life.
   

  

 You will join and flourish within our R&D Cloud and Diagnostics team, working together to support the platforms that keep global cargo moving safely. Because our work is vital to world infrastructure, your role is about more than just compliance; it is about fostering trust and ensuring our products remain a reliable foundation for our customers. By weaving security into the heart of our daily work, you will be a vital contributor to Bromma’s digitalization strategy and the future of the cargo handling industry.
   

  

**What Are Your Key Responsibilities**
* Regulatory Leadership & Compliance: Interpret Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) requirements, translating complex legal mandates into actionable technical specifications and architectural roadmaps for engineering teams.
* SDL Lifecycle Ownership: Architect and enforce the Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL), overseeing the full security continuum from initial threat modeling through to robust incident response strategies.
* Systemic Edge Hardening: Secure proprietary Linux distributions at the build level, leveraging Yocto and CMake to implement hardware-rooted trust and OS-level hardening.
* Secure Code Governance: Lead technical code reviews with a focus on memory safety, secure library integration, and the mitigation of vulnerabilities in high-performance C++ environments.
* Edge Platform Development: Actively contribute to the design and evolution of core edge computing platforms, ensuring performance and security are treated as inseparable priorities.


**What We Offer You**
*"Respect is how we work — across departments, across borders, across job titles. "*
* Rewards that truly count: We create opportunities for growth through diverse experiences and uphold fair, gender-neutral pay, fostering a culture built on equity, empowerment, and continuous development. We also offer a comprehensive rewards package which combines flexibility, wellness, and recognition.
* Safety that moves us forward: Build your career with a company rooted in safety since the 1940s, ensuring stability and an environment that empowers you to speak and be heard.
* Purpose that drives change: You'll contribute to solutions that transform global trade, creating environmental and operational innovations. You'll be in the driver's seat of ideas, developing digital technologies that set industry standards and position us as the forerunner.
* People who move together: You'll collaborate with people who build lasting relationships through global expertise, connections, and a commitment to sustainability.


**Become part of our global network** 
 of 5,300 professionals across 120+ countries, where your work drives innovation, sustainability, and meaningful impact around the world.
   

  

**What You Bring To The Role**
* Core Systems Programming: Expert-level C++ development and advanced Shell scripting for automation and system-level tasks.
* Linux Internals & Hardening: Deep technical knowledge of the Linux kernel, including the implementation and configuration of security modules (LSM).
* Security by Design: Over 5 years of experience architecting resilient software architectures, specifically within high-stakes Industrial, IoT, and Automotive environments.
* DevSecOps & Supply Chain Security: Hands-on experience ensuring code integrity through Static Analysis (SAST) tools and managing software transparency via SBOM generation.
* Embedded Sector Expertise: Proven track record of delivering secure, mission-critical applications that meet the rigorous safety and security standards of the automotive and industrial sectors.


**Ready to elevate your career? Apply today!**
**Join us and take the next step in your career journey with Bromma!** 
 As the interviews may begin before the closing date, we encourage early applications. Please submit your CV in English.
   

  

 We support hybrid work arrangements, offering flexibility to balance office and remote work but don’t provide relocation support.
   

  

 For further information please contact Joel Ek Kanslätt, Manager for R&D Cloud and Diagnostics by phone +46 70 200 04 58 or e-mail: joel.ek.kanslatt@bromma.com.
   

  

 Closing Date:
 **30/04/2026**
 #Bromma
   

  

*Bromma is part of Kalmar.*
**About Kalmar**
*Kalmar (Nasdaq Helsinki: KALMAR) is moving goods in critical supply chains around the world, with the vision to be the forerunner in sustainable material handling equipment and services. The company offers a wide range of industry shaping heavy material handling equipment and services to ports and terminals, distribution centres, manufacturing and heavy logistics. Headquartered in Helsinki, Finland, Kalmar operates globally in over 120 countries and employs approximately 5,300 people. In 2025, the company's sales totalled approximately EUR 1.7 billion. www.kalmarglobal.com*

title: Specialist Solution Engineer
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

**Salesforce** 
 is looking for a motivated and technically strong
 **Solution Engineer** 
 based in Stockholm to join our
 **Marketing Cloud** 
 team in Northern Europe. In this role, you will help customers solve digital marketing challenges by connecting business needs with scalable technology solutions across the MarTech landscape.
   

  

 You will work closely with Account Executives, customers, and internal technical teams to design and demonstrate solutions based on Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data360 (CDP), and related marketing technologies. This role is ideal for someone who combines a strong technical foundation with practical MarTech knowledge and enjoys translating customer requirements into solution designs that support personalized, data-driven engagement.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Business Problem Solving: Take on complex business challenges, utilizing research and business assessment to define problems, generate innovative ideas, identify opportunities, and recommend actionable next steps.
* Technical Solution Design: Work with customers and internal teams to understand marketing, data, and activation requirements and translate them into solution designs using Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data360 (CDP), and adjacent MarTech capabilities.
* MarTech Consulting: Support customers in evaluating and improving their marketing technology setup, including customer data usage, campaign orchestration, segmentation, personalization, and channel execution.
* Solution Demonstrations & Prototyping: Deliver clear and relevant product demonstrations, build lightweight prototypes, and show how Salesforce solutions can address real customer use cases across the marketing lifecycle.
* Data & Integration Understanding: Contribute to solution discussions around integrations, APIs, data flows, identity resolution, and activation use cases. Help customers understand how Marketing Cloud and Data360 (CDP) fit into their broader technology ecosystem.
* Discovery & Technical Validation: Participate in discovery sessions to capture business and technical requirements, assess feasibility, and support the development of solution recommendations aligned to customer goals.
* Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with sales, solution engineering, services, product specialists, and customer success teams to support opportunities and deliver strong customer outcomes.
* Continuous Learning: Stay up to date on Salesforce product capabilities and broader MarTech trends, including customer data platforms, personalization, automation, and digital engagement.


**Qualifications**
**Experience:**
* 3+ years of experience in a similar role such as Solution Engineering, Digital Marketing, or technical consulting or development
* Language Skills: Fluency in both Swedish and English is required
* MarTech Knowledge: Good understanding of the MarTech ecosystem and how platforms for campaign management, customer data, segmentation, personalization, and activation work together.


**Technical Skills**
* Good understanding of modern MarTech ecosystems and how data, activation, personalization, analytics, content, and integrations work together to enable customer engagement at scale. Experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data360 (CDP) concepts and adjacent marketing technologies is valued, but not required.
* Familiarity with topics such as data federation, composable architecture, CDP, flexible data models, identity resolution, clean rooms, cross-channel activation, dynamic content, and performance measurement is a plus. The candidate should be able to explain technical concepts in business terms and understand Salesforce’s role within a broader MarTech stack and brings curiosity for emerging AI-driven and agentic marketing capabilities.
* The right candidate with a strong technical and/or developer background is also welcome to apply, even if you have limited Marketing domain knowledge
* Presentation and Communication Skills. Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to persuasively present complex technical and data-centric concepts to a variety of audiences, from technical teams to C-level executives.
* Problem Solving skills. Structured and solution-oriented mindset with the ability to analyze requirements, identify options, and propose practical next steps.
* Collaboration: Comfortable working in cross-functional teams and contributing to shared success across sales and technical organizations.
* Industry Background: Experience in B2C or digitally mature industries such as Retail, Consumer Goods, Travel, Media, or Financial Services is beneficial.


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Senior Data Engineer till SJ
description:
**Var med och bygg grunden för SJ:s dataplattform**
 SJ moderniserar just nu sitt digitala landskap och data är en central del av den resan. Vi bygger en modern dataplattform på Databricks i Azure, inspirerad av data mesh-principer, där team enkelt ska kunna publicera, upptäcka och använda data som dataprodukter.
   

  

 Vårt team, Foundry, arbetar i gränslandet mellan plattform och verkliga dataprojekt. Vi utvecklar själva plattformskapabiliteterna - katalog, governance, pipelines och utvecklarverktyg - samtidigt som vi arbetar praktiskt med riktiga datakällor och affärsbehov.
   

  

 Det gör att vi kan testa idéer snabbt, hitta rätt tekniska mönster och bygga en plattform som möter behoven. Nu söker vi en Senior Data Engineer som vill vara med och forma den här grunden tillsammans med oss.
   

  

**Vad du kommer arbeta med** 
 Rollen kombinerar plattformstänk med praktisk data engineering. Till exempel kommer du att:
   

  

* Bygga datapipelines och dataprodukter
* Utveckla pipelines och transformationer i Databricks och dbt
* Modellera data och leverera dataprodukter som kan användas av andra team.
* Definiera och utveckla “golden paths” för data engineering
* Ta fram standardiserade sätt att bygga och publicera dataprodukter
* Mallar, SDK:er, verktyg och dokumentation som gör plattformen enkel att använda.
* Utveckla lösningar för dataklassificering, anonymisering, åtkomstkontroller och andra krav kopplade till exempelvis GDPR.
* Samarbeta med utvecklare, analytiker och plattformsteam för att säkerställa att plattformen och dataprodukterna löser verkliga problem och kan användas brett i organisationen.


**Vi tror att du**
* Har mångårig erfarenhet som Data Engineer eller Software Engineer
* Har arbetat praktiskt med Databricks (Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, pipelines)
* Har god erfarenhet av Python och SQL
* Har arbetat i molnmiljö, exempelvis Azure
* Har erfarenhet av dbt eller liknande transformationsverktyg
* Är bekväm med Git-baserade arbetsflöden
* Har arbetat med Infrastructure as Code, t.ex. Terraform
* Tycker om att bygga lösningar som andra utvecklare och analytiker använder


 Du trivs också med att ta struktur ur komplexa dataproblem och omsätta dem i fungerande system.
   

  

**Extra plus om du har erfarenhet av**
* Datakataloger, metadata och lineage
* Interna plattformar eller developer tooling
* Data mesh och dataprodukter
* Analytisk modellering eller BI-plattformar som Power BI
* Backstage


**Varför arbeta hos oss?** 
 På SJ är modern data engineering en central del av vår digitala modernisering. Dataplattformen vi bygger kommer att bli en grundförutsättning för hur data delas och används i hela organisationen. Hos oss får du vara med tidigt i resan och påverka hur plattformen och arbetssätten formas. Du kommer att arbeta i ett erfaret team med stor teknisk frihet och möjlighet att bygga något som får verklig betydelse. Samtidigt bidrar du till något större: hållbara transporter och ett mer tillgängligt Sverige!
   

  

**Teknisk miljö** 
 Vi arbetar bland annat med:
   

  

* Databricks
* dbt
* Azure
* Python
* Terraform
* Github / CI/CD
* Power BI
* Mac eller Windows för utvecklare


**Ansökan och information**
 Urval sker löpande så skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Sista ansökningsdag är 24/5. Under processen kommer vi att genomföra två arbetspsykologiska tester, samt på slutkandidaten kommer vi att genomföra en bakgrundskontroll.

title: Forward Deployed Engineer | Saab
description:
*Do you want to help bridge the gap between today and the future - and play a key role in driving Saab's digital transformation? This is not a traditional developer role. It's a role for curious minds who enjoy variety, creativity and deep technical thinking.* 




  





**Your role** 




 As a Forward Deployed Engineer, you'll work close to our internal product teams, understand their challenges, and turn them into smart, scalable technical solutions. You'll explore new technologies, learn fast and help shape the foundations of future Saab systems.
 



  





**What you'll do** 



* Work hands-on with complex technical problems across different product areas
* Build and improve shared platforms and components used throughout Saab
* Explore and apply technologies like AI, cloud, edge computing and real-time systems
* Collaborate with engineers, architects and domain experts
* Turn ambiguous challenges into clear, elegant solutions
* Influence technical direction and long-term platform strategy



  





**About you** 




 You're someone who enjoys understanding how things work - and how they could work better. You learn quickly, think in systems and like solving problems that don't have obvious answers. Your background might be in software development, systems engineering, data engineering, research engineering or something else entirely. What matters is how you think.
 



  





**You bring** 



* Strong programming ability (language doesn't matter - thinking does)
* Hands-on use of AI to solve technical problems
* Curiosity and a desire to explore new technologies
* Ability to break down complex problems
* A collaborative mindset and willingness to share knowledge
* Experience from building or working with technical systems



  





**Bonus if you have** 



* Experience with AI/ML, cloud, edge or distributed systems
* Interest in platform engineering or architecture
* Experience from real-time or safety-critical environments



  





*Some of our roles require security clearance under Swedish security protection legislation. For roles where Saab has requirements for security classification, this may in some cases entail requirements for a certain citizenship.* 




  





**What you become part of** 




**Common Tech** 
 's mission is to create shared technical capabilities for all of Saab. By developing and managing shared platforms, technical frameworks and ways of working, Common Tech enables efficient, consistent and long-term technology development across the entire organisation. The goal is to give Saab's teams the right technical foundation to develop advanced products with high quality, safety and reliability.
 



  





**Product Tech** 
 is one of several departments within Common Tech and focuses on developing and evolving technical solutions used across multiple products and systems. Here, reusable components, shared functionality and technical solutions are built that help product teams work faster and more structured, while maintaining high standards for stability and quality.
 



  





**Saab** 
 is a leading defence and security company with a clear mission: to help protect people and societies. With around 20,000 employees worldwide, Saab develops advanced technology through close collaboration between people, competencies and disciplines. The company is characterised by an inclusive culture where collaboration, learning and long-term development are central.
 



  





*These positions require approved security clearance under Swedish security protection legislation.* 




  





**Application** 




 This recruitment process is managed by Jefferson Wells on behalf of Saab, meaning you will be directly employed by Saab. For questions about the position, please contact recruiter Mark Ferrer.
 



  





 We do not accept applications by email due to GDPR.
 



  





**Selection and interviews are ongoing. We warmly welcome your application!**

title: AI Engineer, Solna
description:
We seek to strengthen our position and increase the speed of the implementation of AI solutions in PostNord. We are looking for two AI Engineers who will play an important role in helping PostNord to become an AI and data driven business. We offer you a cutting edge Analytics environment and very competent colleagues. Apply now!
   

  

**Join us**
 The Technology Acceleration area within Group IT is responsible for establishing the future IT landscape. This will be the foundation for PostNord' s continued AI and data driven journey. As an AI Engineer your focus will be to answer business challenges using AI in software. In the AI team you will work in an experimental fashion with new AI technologies. You will develop POC’s and MVP’s into enterprise solutions. Our vision is to drastically increase development speed by creating AI Agent Factories to augment the AI Engineers in their work.
   

  

**Job Duties**
* Understand the business requirements and develop AI services accordingly.
* Develop AI services and collaborate closely with our data platform- and domain teams.
* Help design reusable patterns for AI-assisted software development.
* Explain AI systems to project managers and stakeholders.
* Keep up to date on the latest AI technologies.
* Train team members and business stakeholders on the implementation of AI solutions.
* Locate and analyze the relevant data to enable the creation of new AI services.
* Work with the rest of the team to improve communication, collaboration, and deliveries with other teams and stakeholders.
* Document and explain the solutions you produce.


 ,
   

  

* Worked as a Fullstack Developer in a data heavy domain for at least three years
* Prior experience working with generative AI/LLM’s or ML.
* Understands the benefits of using agentic coding to complement the traditional software engineering
* Proficiency in using Claude Code or similar tools to generate code
* Proficiency in programming languages like Python, Typescript/NodeJS and SQL
* Good understanding of core cloud concepts - Azure data storage, Azure compute, data connections, CI/CD and APIs
* Containers, CI/CD, and isolated execution environments


**Meritorious Experience**
* Awareness of legal and ethical considerations in AI, including data privacy, bias and fairness, transparency, and accountability.
* Good communication, collaboration and problem-solving skills
* Creativity, curiosity, and passion for artificial intelligence
* Experience with agentic workflows or AI orchestration
* Experience with evaluation frameworks, scenario testing, or benchmark design
* Proficiency in UI libraries like React or Streamlit
* Proficiency in agentic AI libraries such as Langchain, PydanticAI, Semantic Kernel
* Proficiency in ML libraries such as Scikit-learn and PyTorch
* Cloud literacy - PostNord's data platform is based on Databricks and hosted in Azure
* Experience working with various RAG frameworks
* Want to help shape how AI is used in a modern engineering organization


**Language Requirement**
 Fluent English in speech and writing. Proficiency in at least one Scandinavian language is meritorious.
   

  

**Why this role matters**
 This is an opportunity to help define how AI is used in engineering in a way that is practical, scalable, and grounded in real delivery needs. You will help move us from experimentation toward repeatable ways of working that teams can trust.
   

  

 You will need a collaborative delivery approach to be successful as AI Engineer. As an AI Engineer you will cooperate with stakeholders from the business, as well as with our product owner, and line managers.
   

  

**Your profile as an AI Engineer**
 You have worked with AI solutions in an agile team before. You like to work hands on, and to work directly with business stakeholders. You have an academic background and as a person you are curious to learn and evolve your skill set in accordance with the state-of-the-art pace in the domain that you work in.
   

  

**We offer you**
**Benefits**
 We offer you a flexible hybrid workplace with a prestige-free environment where we as a team help each other to reach our goals. We encourage self-sufficient leadership for development and career opportunities. In addition to the benefits mentioned above, we offer:
   

  

* Work in a Nordic/International and flexible environment.
* Good insurance and occupational pension conditions
* Wellness allowance & access to office gym and swimming pool
* Employee benefits through PostNord's own employee foundation PostNord Plus
* Employment according to a collective agreement.


**We make everyday life easier**
 PostNord is the leading supplier of communication and logistics solutions in the Nordic region, providing postal services to households and businesses in Sweden and Denmark. We aim to make everyday life easier and more sustainable. We value accountability, bravery, and commitment, and emphasize teamwork, sincerity, and positive relationships. Our diverse workplace contributes to better business results. Visit us at postnord.com
   

  

**Apply**
 We look forward to receiving your application! If you have any questions or concerns, you are welcome to contact Christian Mejlvang, Christian.mejlvang@postnord.com

title: Mechanical Component System Engineer
description:
**What we do at Blykalla** 




 At Blykalla, we're transforming the future of nuclear power by developing innovative Small Modular Reactors (SMRs). Our mission is to create a new generation of nuclear energy systems that are safer, more efficient, and environmentally friendly. As Sweden's only developer of SMRs, we're at the forefront of a groundbreaking industry.
 



  





**The role** 




 You will take ownership of the steam generator - one of the most critical components in our SEALER reactor, sitting at the interface between the lead-cooled primary circuit and the power conversion system. You are the system-responsible engineer: defining what it must do, how it should be designed, and who builds it.
 



 The role spans the full engineering lifecycle — from writing requirements and leading trade-off studies, through detailed design, manufacturing coordination, and qualification. You will combine sharp mechanical engineering judgment with the ability to align people, suppliers, and analyses toward a common technical goal.
 



  





**What you'll get to do** 




  





 Your work spans three interconnected areas.
 



  





 On the
 **requirements and design basis side** 
 , you will define the steam generator's functional and design requirements, develop and maintain the design basis documentation, and lead trade-off studies on configuration, materials, and manufacturing approaches.
 



  





 On the
 **mechanical design** 
 side, you will drive decisions on component architecture, assembly sequences, weldability, inspectability, and manufacturability — making sure the design is practical to fabricate, transport, install, test, and maintain.
 



  





 On the
 **thermal-hydraulic and structural** 
 side, you will not run complex simulations yourself, but you will be the one asking the right questions: defining calculation scopes, providing inputs to analysts, and critically reviewing results. You should be comfortable performing hand calculations to sanity-check outputs and steer design iterations.
 



  





 On the
 **coordination side** 
 , you will define the scope and technical content of supplier work packages, evaluate proposals and deliverables from manufacturers, lead design reviews, and keep component development aligned with plant requirements and the project schedule — working across internal teams as well as academic and industrial partners.
 



  





**Who you’ll get to work with** 




 The System Engineer - Steam Generator sits within our Fluid Systems Engineering team at Blykalla, reporting to Federico Barbano. You will collaborate closely with thermal-hydraulic analysts, mechanical and system engineers and procurement team — as well as external suppliers and research partners.
 



 We are a diverse team that is passionate about our work and about Blykalla.
 



  





**Who you are** 




 We are looking for a candidate with up to five years of professional experience. There are a few things we think will help you succeed in this role:
 


* Degree in mechanical, energy, chemical, nuclear engineering or a closely related discipline
* A meaningful portion of your experience spent at a heat exchanger or pressure equipment manufacturer - ideally in a role combining thermohydraulic and mechanical design with production engineering and workshop interface
* Strong working knowledge of heat exchanger mechanical design (ideally steam generators) and applicable design codes and standards such as ASME, PED, or RCC-M
* Thermal-hydraulic and heat transfer fundamentals sufficient to steer and critically review calculations performed by others - including the ability to perform hand calculations to sanity-check results
* Comfort writing clear technical specifications, reviewing deliverables critically, and communicating effectively with both internal colleagues and external suppliers
* Familiarity with CAD tools and engineering software
* Fluent in English, spoken and written



  





 Nuclear experience is welcome but not required — candidates from oil and gas, power generation, petrochemical, and similar industries are highly relevant.
 



  





**Meritorious** 



* Hands-on experience with steam generators or shell-and-tube heat exchangers
* Experience with FEA or CFD — the priority is the ability to define, commission, and review such analyses rather than execute them
* Prior experience coordinating multidisciplinary design work or managing supplier technical interfaces
* Background in the nuclear industry



  





 If you are not sure that you are 100% qualified but are up for the challenge, we encourage you to apply.
 



  





**Location** 




 This position is based at our office in Stockholm.
 



  





**So, what do you think?** 




 Take the chance to be at the forefront of revolutionizing nuclear power. Join and help us shape the energy landscape of tomorrow. Apply today with your resume and a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and achievements.
 



 We offer competitive compensation aligned with our internal salary framework and growth potential in the role.

title: Cloud Data Engineer within Data & Analytics to Customer Relationship Management Tribe | SEB, Solna
description:
*SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you'll be interested in this opportunity!*
**About The Role**
 The Cloud Data Engineering Team within Customer Relationship Management (CRM) Tribe consists of vibrant, ambitious, and extremely friendly future colleagues gathering and providing datasets within the tribe for discovering customer insights and supporting agility around our interactions with both current and potential customers. We work continually to provide these data insights with the goals of building sound customer relationships, improving customer experience and welcoming new customers to SEB. Join us, and with your knowledge and experience we can realize even more possibilities.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Be part of our amazing Cloud Data Engineering Team of 4-6 members dedicated to providing the data needed to drive our Customer Relationship Management activities.
* Work with a broad tech stack including: Git, CI/CD, Python, Kafka, Containers, RESTful APIs, API architecture, BigQuery, Terraform and Dataform.
* Have primary focus on the development of our GCP-based analytical platform products within our cloud data portfolio.
* Broaden your exposure and engagement by working cross team with our other products within our cloud data portfolio.
* Work with standard methodologies around continuous integration to manage products deployed on GCP.
* Gain a deep understanding of our CRM processes, the data available and how this can be used to continually support amazing customer experiences.
* Proactively drive technical solutions within the team.
* Be part of an inspiring work environment in a team that encourages both individual and collective growth and learning.
* Continuously learn new skills through our developer communities, internal workshops, courses, hackathons, innovation weeks and tech guilds.


**To thrive in this role, we believe:**
* You have a relevant data engineering background and experience building and optimizing data pipelines and working with data warehouse and BI environments.
* You are fascinated by learning, gaining, and sharing knowledge.
* You have experience working with ETL/ELT processes.
* You value innovative solutions that push your knowledge and experience to the limit.
* You have experience working with cloud platforms and technologies, preferably GCP (Google Cloud Platform).
* You have experience with Python and Terraform and are skilled at SQL.
* You have experience of and value agile methodologies and ways of working.
* You have knowledge and passion for best practices like continuous delivery, continuous integration and automated testing and monitoring.
* You are happy working both independently and collaboratively.
* You know and understand the importance of the tradeoffs between the perfect and a working solution.


**What We Offer**
* Extensive training and learning opportunities.
* Work-lifebalance.
* International opportunities and working environment.
* Access to SEB staff banking with exclusive benefits.
* Innovative company in forefront of technology.


 Learn more about working at SEB www.sebgroup.com/career It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

**Ready to take the next step on your career journey?**
 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than
 **2026-05-11** 
 . If you have questions about the position, please contact Tuula Söderblom, tuula.söderblom@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

title: Suomenkielinen Business Developer
description:
Miksi BrightAnalytics?
   

  

 BrightAnalytics on yksi Belgian nopeimmin kasvavista fintech-yrityksistä. SaaS-ratkaisumme avulla autamme yrityksiä automatisoimaan johdon raportoinnin. Osana Euroopan laajentumistamme etsimme motivoituneita kollegoita liittymään tiimiimme Tukholman toimistolle. Ruotsista käsin osallistut Suomen markkinoiden kasvuun. Sinulla on mahdollisuus kasvaa ja muokata yrityksen tulevaisuutta Pohjoismaissa.
   

  

 Mitä Business Developer tekee?
   

  

* Ymmärrät prospektiemme vaatimukset ja tarpeet, ja esittelet heille BrightAnalyticsin tarinan.
* Kartoitat liiketoimintamahdollisuuksia kohdennetun segmentoinnin avulla.
* Kasvatat Account Executive -tiimimme liidien määrää kohdennetuilla myyntitoimenpiteillä (outbound-myynti, social selling, messut, seminaarit).
* Etsit jatkuvasti uusia ja luovia tapoja lisätä tunnettuuttamme.
* Tämä positio on ihanteellinen ponnahduslauta menestyksekkäälle uralle B2B-myynnissä.


 Mitä tuot mukanasi myyntitiimiin?
   

  

* Sinulla on maisterin tutkinto, mieluiten kaupalliselta alalta. Aiempi työkokemus ei ole välttämätöntä.
* Suomen kielen sujuva taito on välttämätöntä alustan monimutkaisuuden vuoksi, ja englannin kielen sujuva taito on ehdoton kansainvälisessä ympäristössämme.
* Saat energiaa kommunikoinnista potentiaalisten asiakkaiden kanssa sekä liiketoimintamahdollisuuksien löytämisestä ja kehittämisestä.
* Sinulla on motivaatiota ja itsenäisyyttä, joita tässä keskeisessä roolissa vaaditaan.
* Uteliaisuutta oppia uusia asioita joka päivä.
* Tiimipelaajana olet valmis tekemään parhaasi yhteisen menestyksen eteen.
* Viihdyt nopeasti kehittyvässä ympäristössä.
* Vahva kiinnostus liiketoimintaa, rahoitusta ja uusia teknologioita kohtaan.


 Mitä etuja tämä fintech-scale-up tarjoaa?
   

  

* Pääset osaksi kunnianhimoista, dynaamista ja innostunutta tiimiä monipuolisessa työssä.
* Viikoittaiset sisäiset koulutukset ja työssäoppiminen (coaching) opettavat sinulle ainutlaatuisia taitoja, jotka palvelevat sinua koko urasi ajan.
* Olemme taloudellisesti vakaa scale-up-yritys, jolla on kansainvälisiä kasvutavoitteita.
* Meillä on avoin yrityskulttuuri, jossa on tilaa omalle aloitteellisuudelle.
* Saat kilpailukykyisen palkan ja motivoivan bonusjärjestelmän.
* Liikunta- ja kulttuurietu (Friskvårdsbidrag).
* Eläkesuunnitelma.
* Vakuutukset (sairaus, eläke, TGL, TFA).
* Perjantain after-workit, legendaariset tiimi-illat ja vuosittainen viikonloppumatka koko BrightAnalyticsin tiimin kanssa.


**Oletko valmis kiihdyttämään uraasi fintech-alalla?** 
**Hae tänään ja kasva BrightAnalyticsin mukana!**

title: Systemutvecklare .NET, Stockholm
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
**Vill du att din kod ska bidra till ett mer effektivt och fungerande samhälle?**
 Hos oss utvecklar du lösningar som stärker vård, energi, telekom och andra samhällsbärande funktioner. Det handlar inte bara om teknik, utan om system som tusentals människor är beroende av varje dag.
   

  

 Som .NET-utvecklare hos oss arbetar du som konsult i långsiktiga uppdrag tillsammans med kollegor och kund. Uppdragen varierar från vidareutveckling av befintliga system till nyutveckling och modernisering. Vissa miljöer ligger i teknisk framkant, andra är mer etablerade där stabilitet, kvalitet och långsiktighet är avgörande. Gemensamt är att du får använda din erfarenhet för att fatta tekniska beslut, bidra till hållbar arkitektur och utveckla lösningar som fungerar över tid.
   

  

 Du arbetar genom hela kedjan, från databas och API till användargränssnitt. Backend utvecklas i .NET, C#, ASP.NET Core och REST-API:er med exempelvis Entity Framework Core och SQL Server. På frontend arbetar du med TypeScript och ramverk som React eller Angular. Våra uppdrag finns bland annat inom offentlig sektor, energi och telekom. Vi arbetar agilt i tvärfunktionella team tillsammans med utvecklare, arkitekter, testare och verksamhet, där samarbete och kvalitet står i centrum.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som**
* Har minst fem års erfarenhet av .NET och C#
* Har arbetat med ASP.NET Core, API-utveckling och databaser
* Har erfarenhet av moderna webbtekniker i JavaScript eller TypeScript
* Har byggt eller vidareutvecklat robusta system från datalager till gränssnitt
* Trivs i eller är nyfiken på konsultrollen
* Talar och skriver svenska samt engelska obehindrat


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av Azure eller annan molnplattform
* Erfarenhet av mikrotjänster eller integrationslösningar
* DevOps-arbetssätt såsom CI/CD och containerteknik


**Att arbeta på Sopra Steria**
 Hos oss får du kombinera stabiliteten i ett etablerat bolag med en kultur som präglas av kunskapsdelning och utveckling. Vi erbjuder varierande uppdrag där du kan växa tekniskt och professionellt, oavsett om du vill fördjupa dig i teknik eller ta större ansvar i team och arkitektur. Vi investerar i din utveckling, ditt välmående och din livsbalans.
   

  

**Några Av Våra Förmåner**
* 5 000 kr i friskvård samt hälsostöd för dig och din familj
* 30 dagars semester samt två extra lediga dagar per år
* Certifieringsbonus och aktiv kompetensutveckling
* Initiativ för träning och gemenskap
* Stark föräldralön, tjänstepension och försäkringar
* Bidrag till hemmakontor och arbetsutrustning


**Rekryteringsprocess**
 Vi behandlar ansökningar löpande. Rollen ställer höga krav på kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet. Inför eventuell anställning genomför vi bakgrundskontroll och vid intervju behöver du uppvisa giltig legitimation. Processen består av tre intervjuer, personlighet och logiktest, referenstagning samt bakgrundskontroll. Det ger oss en bred bild av dig och ger dig möjlighet att visa din kompetens ur flera perspektiv.
   

  

 Har du frågor om rollen är du välkommen att kontakta Hanna Korell på hanna.korell@soprasteria.com
   

  

 Välkommen till Sopra Steria i Stockholm. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan.

title: CRM-utvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Minst 2 års arbetslivserfarenhet som utvecklare av MS Dynamics CRM (inom de senaste 10 åren)


 Erfarenhet av minst 1 uppdrag att arbeta med MS Dynamics CRM on Premises.
   

  

 Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av systemutveckling i C# .
   

  

 Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av att jobba i automatiserade CI/CD bygg och deployment miljöer, som Teamcity, Octopus deploy eller motsvarande.
   

  

 Minst 1 års arbetslivserfarenhet av att arbeta med TypeScript och ramverk som Vue, React eller Angular.
   

  

 Minst 2 års arbetslivserfarenhet av att skapa enhetstester i samband med utveckling
   

  

 Minst 2 års arbetslivserfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling med agila principer
   

  

 Arbetslivserfarenhet av minst 1 uppdrag där du utvecklat schemaläggning i Quartz eller motsvarande.
   

  

**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av minst ett uppdrag där du utvecklat, integrerat eller felsökt autentiseringsflöden baserade på SAML2-protokollet, inklusive samverkan med Identity Provider (IdP) och Service Provider (SP).


 Arbetslivserfarenhet från minst 1 uppdrag där du konfigurerat, administrerat och anpassat loggning i Grafana för monitorering.
   

  

 Arbetslivserfarenhet av minst 1 uppdrag där du konfigurerat och administrerat Octopus Deploy för releasehantering.
   

  

 Erfarenhet av minst 1 uppdrag på för en offentlig myndighet/förvaltning de senaste 10 åren.
   

  

 Erfarenhet av minst 1 uppdrag av implementation an headless CMS.
   

  

 Minst 1 uppdrag där arbete med Blazor har ingått.
   

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 24-04-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Software Engineer - Java
description:
**Om rollen** 
 Som utvecklare på Ticket jobbar du tillsammans med drivna, ödmjuka och riktigt skickliga kollegor i produktteam som utvecklar företagets tjänster och digitala affär. Arbetet innebär att bygga nytt, förbättra befintliga lösningar och vidareutveckla system kopplade till Tickets e-handelsplattform.
   

  

 Det här är en roll för dig som gillar backend på riktigt och vill jobba nära tekniska utmaningar som faktiskt spelar roll. Vi hanterar miljardtals prissättningar varje dygn, med
 **höga krav på prestanda, tillgänglighet och svarstider på millisekundnivå** 
 . Samtidigt har vi en utvecklingsmiljö med hög leveransförmåga och arbetar enligt principer som ligger i linje med
 **DORA DevOps Elite** 
 , med snabba och trygga produktionssättningar.
   

  

 Du kommer att jobba i en organisation med korta beslutsvägar, hög förändringstakt och stort mandat nära verksamheten.
 **Våra team och produktägare har mandat att agera – och gör det också** 
 . Hos oss finns inga kommittéer, centrala arkitekturfunktioner eller andra lager som bromsar tempo och genomförande. Teamen bestämmer själva teknikval, arkitektur och hur lösningarna byggs. Det gör att det går snabbt från idé och beslut till verklig effekt i produktion.
   

  

 Hos Ticket arbetar vi huvudsakligen med
 **Java, Spring Boot, AI, mikrotjänster, AWS, Kubernetes** 
 och Vue.js. För den här rollen ligger tyngdpunkten främst inom backend. Vi bygger, vidareutvecklar och driftar vår egen plattform, vilket innebär att du kommer nära både tekniken, produkten och affären. Här finns gott om utrymme för dig som vill ta tekniskt ansvar, driva förbättringar och vara med och höja nivån, både i lösningarna vi bygger och i hur vi arbetar tillsammans.
   

  

 Det vi bygger har dessutom en tydlig och inspirerande koppling till verkliga människor och riktiga behov. Vi är med och förverkligar det som för många är årets bästa tid – semesterresan. Det gör att du inte bara bygger tekniskt avancerade system, utan också en produkt som kunder faktiskt vill köpa och som hjälper dem hela vägen till sin resa.
   

  

**Om dig** 
 Du har en
 **examen inom datavetenskap, systemvetenskap, civilingenjör eller motsvarande utbildning** 
 , alternativt längre erfarenhet av utvecklingsarbete på professionell nivå. Du har
 **minst tre års erfarenhet av utveckling i Java** 
 , även om det inte behöver vara ditt primära språk. Du får gärna ha en bred erfarenhet av olika språk och miljöer, men erfarenhet av Java och Spring är särskilt meriterande.
   

  

 Du gillar att bygga effektiva, robusta och skalbara system och trivs i team där man både tar ansvar för sin egen leverans och hjälper varandra att bli bättre. Hos oss får du stora möjligheter att leda och driva utvecklingen av backend i våra miljöer, både genom egna initiativ och som tekniskt bollplank till andra. Som person uppskattar du att utmanas av ny teknik och tycker helt enkelt att kod är kul.
   

  

 Du ser att AI har en självklar plats i modernt utvecklingsarbete och är
 **van att använda Claude Code eller liknande verktyg** 
 som en naturlig del av hur du utvecklar. Du tycker om att diskutera lösningar, utmana tankar och dela med dig av din erfarenhet. Du drivs av att bygga bra saker tillsammans med andra duktiga människor och motiveras av miljöer där det finns höga ambitioner, stort förtroende och goda möjligheter att påverka. Du har goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.
   

  

**Hos Ticket** 
 Givetvis har du sex veckors semester, flex så vardagen fungerar, möjlighet till visst arbete hemifrån, full tjänstepension enligt ITP och
 **trevliga reseförmåner** 
 . Ticket sitter i toppmoderna lokaler i Sickla, några minuter från Slussen. För Tickets anställda finns parkering utanför kontoret.
   

  

 På Ticket är vi stolta över att vara ett företag med människor från olika bakgrunder. Vi vet att mångfald inte bara gör oss starkare, utan också mer innovativa, och att olika perspektiv gör oss mer kreativa. Vi strävar efter att vara en attraktiv arbetsplats som är fri från diskriminering och ger lika möjligheter för alla.
   

  

 Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen får du göra ett personlighetstest och ett logiskt test för att vi ska kunna göra en rättvis och träffsäker bedömning. Det tar cirka 30 minuter totalt. En objektiv urvalsprocess möjliggör att alla kandidater bedöms på samma sätt, utifrån egenskaper som är relevanta för den aktuella tjänsten. Lönespann kan kommuniceras under intervjuprocessen och bakgrundkontroll sker innan anställning.

title: Senior Dotnet Developer
description:
Vi söker en senior utvecklare eller staff engineer till Specops. På Specops bygger vi flera produkter som hjälper några av världens största företag att hantera identitetsbaserad risk.
 



  





 Som utvecklare hos oss kommer du arbeta med att skapa produkter för säkerhet och autentisering som används av miljoner användare världen över.
 



  





**Om teamet** 




 Vi är 18 personer i teamet som bygger Specops. Vi sitter i Posthuset, mitt emot centralstationen i Stockholm. Vårt team är seniora utvecklare som får mycket ansvar hela vägen från arkitektur till färdiga produkter.
 



  





**Om dig** 




 För att lyckas i rollen behöver du:
 


* Erfarenhet av att utveckling i C#
* Tycker om att samarbeta i team och lösa problem tillsammans
* Är öppen för att jobba cloud och on-prem
* Gillar att gräva djupare i säkerhet
* Har erfarenhet av att koda med hjälp av AI agenter



  





 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av C++, men inget måste.
 



  





 Om detta låter som något för dig, ansök idag så tar vi kontakt med dig inom kort.

title: AI-systemarkitekt
description:
**AI-systemarkitekt – för dig som kan kod, system och vet hur man dirigerar agenter**
 Gullers Grupp söker en AI-systemarkitekt. Det här är inte en roll för dig som precis börjat använda AI-verktyg – och inte heller för dig som bara skriver kod. Vi söker en senior profil som har byggt system i många år, vet hur programvara faktiskt fungerar, och som nu använder AI-agenter som sitt primära verktyg för att designa och driftsätta lösningar.
   

  

 Du behöver inte skriva kod, men du måste
 *tänka* 
 den – kunna läsa en stack trace, veta var man felsöker, och dirigera agenter eller subagenter till att producera programvara som håller i produktion.
   

  

**Vi tror att du har erfarenhet av:**
* mångårigt arbete som utvecklare eller arkitekt, med system du byggt och driftsatt i skarp miljö
* moderna utvecklingsmiljöer som VS Code, gärna med agentbaserade verktyg (Claude Code, Lovable, Cursor, Copilot)
* deploy i molnmiljöer som Google Cloud, Azure eller AWS – CI/CD, containers, infrastruktur som kod
* integrationer via API:er och webhooks mellan olika system
* grafdatabaser och förståelse för när en grafmodell är rätt verktyg


**Det är viktigt att du:**
* förstår grunderna i agentbaserade AI-system – MCP, verktygsanrop, agenter och subagenter, orkestrering i flera steg
* har praktisk förståelse för hur olika LLM-modeller skiljer sig åt och kan välja rätt modell för rätt uppgift
* är en systemtänkare som ser helheten och kan felsöka på arkitekturnivå
* kan dirigera AI-agenter att bygga programvara – bryta ner problem, specificera tydligt och granska output kritiskt
* kan förklara tekniska beslut på ett tydligt sätt även för kollegor utan teknisk bakgrund
* har gott omdöme kring kvalitet, säkerhet och kostnad när AI används i professionella sammanhang


**Meriterande:**
* egna agentsystem driftsatta i produktion (inte bara experiment)
* RAG, vektordatabaser och hybridsökning
* observability och utvärdering av AI-flöden
* Python som primärt språk (men vi är öppna för andra bakgrunder)


 Du kommer arbeta nära utvecklare, AI-specialister, strateger och kreatörer för att bygga lösningar som skapar konkret nytta – både internt och i våra kunduppdrag.
   

  

 Tjänsten utgår från vårt kontor i Stockholm och inleds med provanställning med ambition om fast anställning.

title: Senior Dotnet Developer
description:

**Om teamet**
