title: Project Manager
description:
***This is us***

  

At Avenga, we believe that human creativity empowers technology that matters. Operating globally, our 6000+ specialists provide a full spectrum of services, including business and tech advisory, enterprise solutions, CX, UX and Ul design, managed services, product development, and software development.  

  



***This is the job***

  

Avenga is looking for a skilled **Project Manager / Change Lead** to join our team full-time. You will be supporting large-scale IT transformation programs across major organizations in Sweden.


As a Senior Change Lead, you will drive and coordinate change management activities within complex IT programs, working closely with program management, project managers, operations, and IT teams. Your role will be critical in ensuring successful adoption of new systems, processes, and ways of working.


You will act as a bridge between strategic transformation goals and operational execution, ensuring that change initiatives are effectively implemented, communicated, and embedded across the organization.  

  

***This is you***:

* Senior Change Lead with experience of the role from IT transformation programs in larger organizations
* Experience of change management in connection with IT transformation programs and system changes
* Experience and knowledge of established frameworks, methods and tools in change management, such as Prosci ADKAR and similar
* Experience in coordinating change management with communication and training efforts, as well as following up on implementation, risks and readiness
* Good understanding of IT projects and project processes as well as knowledge of integrating Change Management and IT project planning
* Pragmatic approach and can oscillate between a holistic perspective and operational execution, such as facilitation, analysis and production of documentation
* Excellent communication and presentation skills in Swedish and English

***This is your role***

* Lead and drive change management activities within major IT programs and transformations
* Collaborate closely with program management, project managers, IT, and business stakeholders
* Align change initiatives with communication and training strategies
* Assess organizational readiness, identify risks, and implement mitigation plans
* Ensure effective integration of change management into IT project planning and execution
* Facilitate workshops, stakeholder alignment sessions, and change impact analyses
* Develop and maintain change documentation, plans, and reporting structures
* Monitor adoption and ensure sustainable implementation of changes
* Act as a key advisor on change strategy and execution across the organization  

  

*At Avenga, everyone matters. We provide equal opportunities in recruitment, career development, and leadership, regardless of race, ethnicity, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, age, religion, or any other characteristic. We are committed to fostering a work environment where our diverse community of employees, candidates, and business partners actively shapes our growth. By bringing together people from different backgrounds and experiences, we build a workplace where everyone feels free to be themselves while honoring the boundaries of others.*
company_description: Avenga is an international consultancy and technology solutions partner with 6000+ specialists globally.

title: UX/UI-designer inom kraftsystemanalys
description:
**Bakgrund och Uppdragsbeskrivning**


En av Svenska kraftnäts IT-sektioner behöver förstärkning. Som UX/UI-designer kommer du ansvara för att skapa användarvänliga, visuellt tilltalande och effektiva digitala upplevelser. Du ansvarar för att förstå användarnas behov och omsätta insikter till


användarcentrerade designlösningar som skapar värde för både användare och verksamheten. Arbetet omfattar applikationer som hanterar och bearbetare stora datamängder för att möjliggöra planering av det svenska transmissionsnätet inklusive utbyte av data med de nordiska systemoperatörerna samt planering och utveckling av det svenska elnätet. Du kommer, över avtalstiden, att arbeta som UX-designer i projekt eller leveransteam som arbetar inom sektionens ansvarsområde. Teamen är tvärfunktionella och består av ett flertal personer med olika roller såsom produktägare, scrum master, systemutvecklare, testare och kravanalytiker. Arbete


drivs i tätt samarbete med användare i form av data scientists och kraftsystemanalytiker, samt även andra intressenter såsom domän- och lösningsarkitekter, projektledare, mfl. Då verksamheten har höga säkerhetskrav arbetar vi primärt med inköpta eller egenutvecklade on prem lösningar alternativt gemensamma nordiska tjänster. Våra egenutvecklade system är utvecklade i C#, Python, C++ och/eller React samt driftas på Windows, Linux eller Kubernetes. Du kommer initialt att arbeta i två leveransteam men under avtalsperioden kan det bli aktuellt att jobba i andra team eller projektgrupper. Idag arbetar vi projektbaserat enligt PPS och leveransteamen som tillhör förvaltningsorganisationen arbetar agilt. Det är viktigt med erfarenhet av agilt UX/UI-arbete


med tillhörande metoder och verktyg (t.ex. Azure DevOps, Axure.

**Arbetsuppgifter**


Rollen kombinerar användarcentrerad design (UX) med visuellt gränssnitt (UI) och innebär ett nära samarbete med ett flertal andra roller och intressenter. Konsulten driver designprocessen från insikt och idé till prototyp och färdig lösning.


Arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat att innefatta:

* Genomföra användarundersökningar, intervjuer och användartester.
* Ta fram personas, scenarios, kundresor och användarflöden.
* Identifiera problem, behov och möjligheter genom research och dataanalys.
* Utveckla högupplösta prototyper och visuella koncept.
* Designa komponenter, ikoner och layout enligt modern designpraxis.
* Arbeta med typografi, färgsystem och visuella riktlinjer.
* Säkerställa att designen följer företagets designsystem — eller bidra till att vidareutveckla ett.
* Skapa design som fungerar responsivt och tillgängligt på olika plattformar.
* Arbeta tätt ihop med utvecklingsteam kring implementering av design.
* Presentera designförslag och leda workshops för att engagera team och stakeholders.
* Delta i produktplanering och bidra med designperspektiv i strategiska beslut.
* Följa upp implementationer och säkerställa att designen omsätts korrekt i produkten.
* Genomföra och analysera användartester för kontinuerlig förbättring.
* Säkerställa god tillgänglighet enligt WCAG och andra standarder.

title: Technical Operations Manager
description:
*The world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service is looking for a* **Technical Operations Manager** *to join the band in a consultant assignment. The client has transformed music listening forever when launched in 2008.*

***Period:*** *2026-05-08 to 2026-11-07 (full-time), with a possibility of extension.*

#### **About the role**


We are looking for a highly motivated individual to join our team as a Technical Operations Manager focused on Creator Monetization. This role is critical to our mission of enabling more creators to live off their art. As our client rapidly expands its creator programs, particularly in audiobooks and podcasts, we are expecting to significantly grow our creator base.


You will be at the forefront of scaling our creator support model, acting as the central point of contact for complex payment, tax and system-related issues. You will shield our engineering teams from day-to-day escalations, allowing them to focus on building long-term, scalable solutions. This is a vital role that ensures our creators have a seamless and reliable payment experience as we continue to grow.

#### **What you'll do**

* Serve as the subject-matter expert and central triage point for all creator payout issues, ensuring tickets are properly assigned and resolved efficiently.
* Manage and prioritize technical support queues (Jira) for creator payment inquiries, unpayable statuses, and other technical onboarding issues.
* Utilize internal financial tooling and back-office systems to diagnose and resolve issues related to payment eligibility, tax status, and account setup.
* Proactively identify and clean up legacy creator profiles with incomplete banking or tax information to ensure compliance and payment success.
* Aggregate issue patterns and provide data-driven insights to Engineering and Product teams to inform the roadmap for automation, tooling enhancements, and improved creator-facing UX.
* Develop and maintain playbooks, internal FAQs, and standard operating procedures to minimize escalations and empower L1/L2 support teams.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Engineering, Finance, Commerce, and Legal to manage and resolve major payout-related incidents.
* Handle operational tasks such as creator earnings adjustments, account changes, and data corrections.

#### **Who you are**

* You have a background in Technical Support, Customer Success, or Operations, preferably in a tech or finance-related industry.
* You are highly proficient with ticketing systems like Jira and are comfortable navigating and using various internal tools and systems.
* You have a foundational understanding of SQL and are comfortable querying data to investigate issues.
* You are an excellent communicator with strong written and verbal English skills.
* You are a highly organized multi-tasker with strong attention to detail, analytical skills, and project management abilities who thrives in a fast-paced environment.
* You have experience managing technical escalations, identifying patterns in incidents, and providing feedback to technical teams.
* You are a standout colleague who believes in the power of teamwork and are passionate about the opportunity to learn and grow at our client.

#### **We are Market Partner**

*Market Partner is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome to our community regardless of who you are, no matter where you come from, or what you look like. We apply ongoing selection and may fill the position as soon as we find the right candidate.*

title: UX Designer Vardagsbank
description:
**Att jobba som UX Designer inom Vardagsbank**  

Som UX Designer hos oss på Skandiabanken kliver du in i en central roll där du ansvarar för kundens upplevelse av våra tjänster. Du blir en del av avdelningen Vardagsbank, där vi fokuserar på de tjänster kunderna använder allra mest - kort, konto och betalningar. Här är förväntningarna på enkelhet som högst, vilket gör ditt uppdrag både utmanande och stimulerande. Du kommer att tillhöra ett tvärfunktionellt team och arbeta nära produktägare, utvecklare och andra specialister. Vi arbetar iterativt och hypotesdrivet genom hela resan, från tidig analys och research till färdigställda lösningar redo för utveckling.  

  

Dina dagliga uppgifter innebär bland annat att:

* Leda designarbete inom komplexa och ofta regelverksstyrda initiativ.
* Jobba operativt med lösningsförslag, flödesscheman och wireframes i Figma.
* Genomföra djupintervjuer, observationer och dataanalys för att skapa djupa insikter om kundernas behov.
* Validera lösningar genom att förbereda, genomföra och analysera användningstester.
* Presentera koncept för team och intressenter samt påverka våra gemensamma designmetoder.

 **För att lyckas i rollen**  

Vi söker dig som är självdriven och orädd för att driva förändring. Du har en förmåga att växla mellan detaljfokus och helhetsperspektiv, och du trivs med att pedagogiskt motivera dina designval utifrån kundnytta. Då rollen innebär många kontaktytor är det avgörande att du är en god kommunikatör som kan anpassa ditt budskap efter mottagaren.


Vi ser att du har:

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet från en liknande roll som UX Designer.
* God erfarenhet av att arbeta i Figma.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av UX-research och användningstester.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift.


Erfarenhet av designarbete i en regelverksstyrd verksamhet, såsom bank eller försäkring, är meriterande.


Välkommen med din ansökan bestående av CV och portfolio!

 **Vad händer nu?**


Vi jobbar med löpande urval så tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag. I ansökan kommer vi att ställa ett antal urvalsfrågor som ligger till grund för första urvalet. För att göra rekryteringsprocessen så rättvis och objektiv som möjligt kommer det att ingå intervjuer, tester, bakgrundskontroll samt digital referenstagning.


Om du har frågor kring rollen, vänligen kontakta rekryterande chef Fredrik Ekström på Fredrik.Ekstrom@skandia.se.


Om du har frågor kopplat till rekryteringsprocess, vänligen ta kontakt med Linda Bäckström på Linda.Backstrom@skandia.se.


Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

**Mer om Banken**


Vi har varit pionjärer inom digital bankverksamhet sedan starten 1994, som Sveriges första helt digitala bank. Med en passion för innovation och kundfokus har vi vuxit till att erbjuda ett brett utbud av produkter och tjänster inom områdena Låna, Spara och Betala – med särskilt fokus på bolån.


Vår verksamhet är fördelad mellan Stockholm och Linköping. I Stockholm finns majoriteten av vår verksamhet, medan vår kundservice har sitt hjärta i Linköping. Tillsammans är vi cirka 270 medarbetare anställda på banken som varje dag skapar smarta lösningar för våra kunder.

**Vårt erbjudande inkluderar:**
  

* **Låna:** Transparenta och attraktivt prissatta bolån
* **Spara:** Sparande i fonder och aktier samt på sparkonto
* **Betala:** Lönekonto samt smidiga kort- och betalningstjänster.

Vi tror på att människor som utvecklas, presterar och mår bra är nyckeln till framgång. Hos oss är kompetensutveckling och lärande självklara delar av vardagen – framåt tillsammans!

title: Content Producer
description:
We are now looking for a Content Producer to strengthen our content team. This is a purely operational role focused on producing, optimising and publishing content and landing pages on our website.

##### **About the role**


The main objective of this role is to produce and publish high-quality content for our website across multiple markets.


You will work hands-on in WordPress, creating pages, producing content, updating Product Listing Pages (PLPs), and publishing editorial content. The focus is execution – making sure content is SEO-optimised, correctly structured and published without errors.


You will collaborate closely with SEO, Content Creative and Merchandising, with a focus on content production and implementation.

##### **What you’ll do**

* Build, optimise, and maintain a wide range of landing pages, including PLPs, editorial pages, campaign landing pages, and hubs.
* Create master versions of landing pages in WordPress and roll them out across all domains.
* Produce and QA landing page content using AI-powered workflows, leveraging prompting, automation, and tooling to produce high-quality copy efficiently and at scale.
* Write and refine copy (short and long format) for website content, ensuring quality, consistency, and performance.
* Support SEO optimisation of landing pages, including structure, metadata, and content improvements.
* QA and ensure correct structure, formatting, and SEO setup across all pages.
* Support onsite campaign updates and content execution.
* Ensure design, layout, and messaging are consistent with our brand guidelines.

##### **What you bring**

* 2+ years of experience in content production, or copywriting or e-commerce.
* Outstanding writing skills in English and Swedish. Additional languages are beneficial.
* Solid understanding of SEO and search intent.
* Hands-on experience working in WordPress or similar CMS.
* Comfortable working with templates, content blocks and basic HTML.
* Curious and Familiar with AI tools for content productio**n.**
* Basic understanding of UX for e-commerce pages.
* A proactive, solution-oriented mindset.

##### **What we offer**

* A hands-on role with clear ownership of content production.
* Opportunity to work in an international e-commerce environment.
* A dynamic, fast-paced environment with high ambitions and short decision paths.
* A collaborative and value-driven culture, with genuine respect for people and ideas.
* Competitive salary and benefits, including wellness allowance and more.
* A newly developed office in Malmö, designed for collaboration and performance, including a fully equipped on-site gym.

##### **Apply**


Apply with your CV together with a short cover letter on what attracts you to the role. We review candidates continuously, so please submit your application as soon as possible but no later than April 30th.


Start date: By agreement

##### **About Rugvista**


Rugvista is one of Europe’s leading online rug retailers, offering a seamless digital shopping experience across +20 markets. For 20 years, we have built our own brand by combining design, quality and value, from accessible products to high-end handmade rugs.


We are a team of around 100 people, headquartered in Malmö with an additional office in Berlin. Listed on Nasdaq First North Premier Growth Market (RUG), our vision is to become the go-to brand for rugs in Europe.

title: Product Designer
description:
*Vi tror på ett samhälle format av framgångsrika företag där entreprenörskap och samhällsnytta går hand i hand. Att vara en del av Fortnox är att vara en del av en ständig förändring - en förändring där du själv bestämmer hur långt du vill nå. Vårt största fokus är att ge dig rätt förutsättningar att få leva din passion tillsammans med oss. Var du kommer ifrån är inte relevant - det är vart du är på väg som är intressant för oss. Precis som vi igår inte kunde drömma om det Fortnox som finns idag, så kan du vara med och forma vilka vi är imorgon.*

 **Om tjänsten**


Som produktdesigner hos oss kliver du rakt in i hjärtat av vår verksamhet. Du ingår i ett autonomt, tvärfunktionellt team som äger sina egna arbetsprocesser och releaser. Här arbetar du i skärpunkten mellan det stabila beprövade och det nya spännande, med stor möjlighet att påverka hur vi designar våra produkter framåt. Du arbetar nära både designers och designområdeschefen inom ditt produktområde.


Rollen handlar om att förenkla komplexa uppgifter till en trygg och användarvänlig upplevelse. Rollen fokuserar på automatisering av underlag samt effektivisering av ekonomiska processer.


**Mer specifikt kommer du att:**

* Samarbeta nära produkt-, och utveckling och involvera dem i designprocessen.
* Driva UX-research genom olika tekniker, exempelvis användningstester, intervjuer, observationer och A/B-tester.
* Vara en nyckelperson i dialogen med utvecklare för att säkerställa att designbeslut och UI-komponenter implementeras med kvalitet och precision.
* Skapa prototyper och mockups, och utveckla koncept- och interaktionsdesign som inspirerar och engagerar våra användare.
* Kartlägga och utforma användarresor för att skapa en sammanhängande upplevelse i hela Fortnox ekosystem.
* Skriva en genomtänkt och användarcentrerad UX-copy på både svenska och engelska.

**Om dig**


Vi söker en produktdesigner som:

* Är kommunikativ och känner sig bekväm att dela sina tillvägagångssätt och resultat med kollegor och stakeholders i organisationen.
* Har minst 5 års erfarenhet inom produktdesign och är bekväm med att självständigt ta initiativ, planera och genomföra ditt arbete.
* Har gedigen erfarenhet av att jobba med interaktionsdesign, informationsarkitektur, tillgänglighet och visuell design.
* Har jobbat med agil produktutveckling och tror på snabba iterationer och kontinuerligt lärande.
* Har erfarenhet av datadrivet arbete med både kvalitativ och kvantitativ data. Med erfarenhet av att utföra egen research och kunna använda insikterna för att motivera designbeslut.
* Har förmågan att översätta användarnas behov och designa lösningar som ligger i linje med såväl användarnas önskemål som Fortnox affärsplan.
* Är kommunikativ och känner sig bekväm att dela sina tillvägagångssätt och resultat med kollegor och stakeholders i organisationen.
* Behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
* Har en portfolio som visar processer och effekter i flera projekt.


Erfarenhet av eller nyfikenhet på AI och automation är meriterande.

 **Fortnox - mitt i företagslivet**  

*Fortnox hjälper företag att starta, växa och utvecklas. Med smarta tekniska lösningar för företag och redovisningsbyråer, smidig finansiering och ett ekosystem av starka partnerskap är Fortnox ett nav för företagande i Sverige. Vi drivs av visionen om ett välmående samhälle format av framgångsrika företag.*

*Fortnox grundades 2001 med huvudkontor i Växjö. Läs mer på www.fortnoxgroup.com.*

 **Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: UX/UI Designer Intern
description:
**XR Solutions** 




**UX/UI Designer Intern — XR / AR Platform (Remote)** 




  





**About us** 




 We build augmented reality systems for industrial clients. Our software runs on factory floors and in production environments, guiding technicians through maintenance, inspection, and operations on real machinery. The common thread across our work: AR content has to stay precisely locked to real-world equipment, reliably, in environments that weren't designed for it.
 



  





**The role** 




 This is not a “support” design role.
 



  





 You will take ownership of the UX/UI for our XR glasses platform — designing interfaces that technicians rely on in real working environments. This includes everything from step-by-step workflows to live AR collaboration tools and real-time data overlays.
 



  





 You’ll work across the full design process, from early research to production-ready design, in close collaboration with product and engineering.
 



  





 Remote to start, with the option to move hybrid later.
 



  





**What you’ll do** 



* Own the UX/UI design process end-to-end (research → concept → prototype → delivery)
* Design for XR environments (spatial UI, voice, gestures, eye tracking)
* Conduct user research and usability testing with real industrial users
* Build and evolve design systems in Figma
* Work closely with developers (Unity) to bring designs into production



  





**What we’re looking for** 



* Strong working experience in Figma (you know your way around systems, not just screens)
* Experience building and maintaining design systems
* Ability to work independently and make decisions without constant direction
* Clear, structured thinking and attention to detail



  





**Nice to have** 



* Experience with AR / XR / spatial design
* Experience working with Unity or similar environments



  





**Important to know** 



* This is an
 **unpaid internship**
* High-performing interns are considered for a
 **paid role**



  





 We aim to make this worth your time:
 



 You’ll work on a live product, solve real problems, and gain experience in a space most designers don’t get access to early in their careers.
 



  





**What you’ll gain** 



* Hands-on experience designing for XR hardware
* Exposure to industrial use cases (not just consumer apps)
* A strong, real-world portfolio project
* Potential pathway to a full-time role



  





 Interested? Send us your CV. We'd love to hear from you.

title: UX/UI-designer inom kraftsystemanalys
description:
**Bakgrund och Uppdragsbeskrivning**
 En av Svenska kraftnäts IT-sektioner behöver förstärkning. Som UX/UI-designer kommer du ansvara för att skapa användarvänliga, visuellt tilltalande och effektiva digitala upplevelser. Du ansvarar för att förstå användarnas behov och omsätta insikter till
   

  

 användarcentrerade designlösningar som skapar värde för både användare och verksamheten. Arbetet omfattar applikationer som hanterar och bearbetare stora datamängder för att möjliggöra planering av det svenska transmissionsnätet inklusive utbyte av data med de nordiska systemoperatörerna samt planering och utveckling av det svenska elnätet. Du kommer, över avtalstiden, att arbeta som UX-designer i projekt eller leveransteam som arbetar inom sektionens ansvarsområde. Teamen är tvärfunktionella och består av ett flertal personer med olika roller såsom produktägare, scrum master, systemutvecklare, testare och kravanalytiker. Arbete
   

  

 drivs i tätt samarbete med användare i form av data scientists och kraftsystemanalytiker, samt även andra intressenter såsom domän- och lösningsarkitekter, projektledare, mfl. Då verksamheten har höga säkerhetskrav arbetar vi primärt med inköpta eller egenutvecklade on prem lösningar alternativt gemensamma nordiska tjänster. Våra egenutvecklade system är utvecklade i C#, Python, C++ och/eller React samt driftas på Windows, Linux eller Kubernetes. Du kommer initialt att arbeta i två leveransteam men under avtalsperioden kan det bli aktuellt att jobba i andra team eller projektgrupper. Idag arbetar vi projektbaserat enligt PPS och leveransteamen som tillhör förvaltningsorganisationen arbetar agilt. Det är viktigt med erfarenhet av agilt UX/UI-arbete
   

  

 med tillhörande metoder och verktyg (t.ex. Azure DevOps, Axure.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Rollen kombinerar användarcentrerad design (UX) med visuellt gränssnitt (UI) och innebär ett nära samarbete med ett flertal andra roller och intressenter. Konsulten driver designprocessen från insikt och idé till prototyp och färdig lösning.
   

  

 Arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat att innefatta:
   

  

* Genomföra användarundersökningar, intervjuer och användartester.
* Ta fram personas, scenarios, kundresor och användarflöden.
* Identifiera problem, behov och möjligheter genom research och dataanalys.
* Utveckla högupplösta prototyper och visuella koncept.
* Designa komponenter, ikoner och layout enligt modern designpraxis.
* Arbeta med typografi, färgsystem och visuella riktlinjer.
* Säkerställa att designen följer företagets designsystem — eller bidra till att vidareutveckla ett.
* Skapa design som fungerar responsivt och tillgängligt på olika plattformar.
* Arbeta tätt ihop med utvecklingsteam kring implementering av design.
* Presentera designförslag och leda workshops för att engagera team och stakeholders.
* Delta i produktplanering och bidra med designperspektiv i strategiska beslut.
* Följa upp implementationer och säkerställa att designen omsätts korrekt i produkten.
* Genomföra och analysera användartester för kontinuerlig förbättring.
* Säkerställa god tillgänglighet enligt WCAG och andra standarder.

title: User Researcher
description:
*Natural Cycles° is a leading women’s health company that developed the world’s first birth control app, used by millions globally. We are a fast growing startup, and we promote an international working environment filled with smart and ambitious colleagues based in Stockholm, Geneva, New York, and remotely. Our mission is to pioneer women’s health through research and passion, empowering every woman with the knowledge she needs to take charge of her health.* 




  





 We are seeking a user researcher to join our User Research team and partner directly with our Product teams. In this role, you'll be a key player in shaping our understanding of user behavior and needs across our various product areas. You will be responsible for leading research efforts to inform product strategy and design, helping us create intuitive, valuable experiences for our users. You'll act as a strategic partner to our product teams, helping them uncover the most impactful questions to ask and ensuring our decisions are grounded in user insights.
 



  





**Please note that we are hiring for this role in Sweden.** 




  





**What you will be doing** 



* **Lead the research:** 
 Product team research: Lead, plan, and execute end-to-end research studies across our core product teams, including optimizing the app experience for active users, evaluating hardware wearability, and researching features such as in-app messaging to ensure a supportive user journey.
* **Conduct impactful research:** 
 Use a mix of qualitative and quantitative methods, including user interviews, usability testing, surveys, and diary studies, to generate actionable insights. You should be proficient in selecting the right method for the right question.
* **Partner with the team:** 
 Work closely with product managers, designers, engineers, and data analysts across different teams to embed user research into the product development lifecycle. You will help them develop hypotheses and validate product ideas.
* **Communicate findings:** 
 Synthesize complex research findings into clear, compelling narratives. You will present your insights to stakeholders throughout the organization, acting as a powerful advocate for the user.
* **Advocate for user-centered design:** 
 Champion user needs and preferences throughout the organization, educating team members on the value of user research.
* **Hardware & wearables:** 
 Partner with our Devices team to evaluate how users interact with our physical hardware. You will lead studies on the end-to-end experience, device setup, and the long-term ergonomics and wearability of our products.



  





**What skills and experience we think you have** 



* **Experience in user research:** 
 Minimum of 4 years of experience as a user researcher in a commercial product setting, with a strong portfolio showcasing a variety of research projects and methodologies. A plus is if you’ve worked in related fields, e.g., health-related products/services or medical products.
* **Proficiency in research methods & tools:** 
 A deep understanding of user research methodologies, including qualitative and quantitative approaches. You should have extensive experience in conducting interviews, usability tests, and surveys, and know when to apply each method. You are comfortable managing research tools such as Maze, and Prolific or UserInterviews for participant recruitment. Experience leveraging analytics platforms (e.g., Mixpanel, Hotjar, or Google Analytics) to triangulate behavioral data with qualitative insights is highly valued. Curiosity about AI in research is a plus.
* **Collaboration skills:** 
 Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build strong relationships and influence cross-functional teams.
* **Strategic thinking:** 
 A desire to go beyond answering simple questions to uncover deeper user needs and business opportunities. You are a natural problem-solver who can frame research in a way that drives strategic decisions.
* **Language skills:** 
 English on a professional level is key. Fluency in additional languages is a significant plus.
* **Hardware & medical device experience:** 
 If you have experience in usability testing for medical devices (specifically
 **EN** 
**62366** 
 standards), that’s a significant bonus; if not, a strong curiosity and a willingness to learn our regulatory environment are just as important.



  





**What we offer** 



* Flexible work arrangement - you will be part of a team based in and around Stockholm that values effective collaboration and transparent communication, irrespective of work location
* Professional development - you will work alongside knowledgeable colleagues in the continuous growth and skill enhancement environment
* Modern technology - you will leverage innovative technologies and tools, within an environment that empowers you to contribute ideas and take ownership of your work
* Impactful projects - you will contribute to groundbreaking projects that redefine industry standards and create tangible value
* Commitment to quality - you will join a dynamic and progressive organization that prioritizes profitable, long-term product development



  





**Location** 




 We are remote-friendly, but we find great value in being able to connect with our teams in person. Most of the User Research team you will work with is located in Stockholm.
 



  





 Not living in Sweden? No problem! We offer relocation support to help you move.
 



  





**Sounds interesting?** 




 If you want to be part of a successful team, we encourage you to apply for this position as soon as possible. We look forward to hearing from you!
 



  





**How to apply** 




 To apply, just upload your CV and answer the questions on the application form. Keep in mind that we can't accept applications through email because of GDPR, and only applications submitted via the career site (and in English) will be considered.
 



 At Natural Cycles we value diversity and inclusion because we know that teams with people from different backgrounds and experiences are stronger. We welcome candidates from all walks of life and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and candidates.
 



  





  





**Note: We are not looking for consultants or help from recruitment agencies**

title: Product Marketing Manager
description:
The Product Marketing manager will be a key piece to work alongside our VP Marketing and incoming Growth Marketing Lead in a brand new marketing team set-up for Verified.
   

  

 We need someone to own the Verified narrative. You’re the bridge between what Verified builds and what the market sees. It requires a high level of ownership and the ability to jump between long-term strategy and rapid execution.
   

  

 This is a blank canvas opportunity for someone who wants to drive change and build a function from zero.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Product Partnership: You will spend a lot of time with the product team. Your job is to understand the "why" behind our tech and translate it into a clear, competitive narrative.
* Creative Content: We need someone who can craft technical messaging that builds trust, but also unexpected and engaging content that cuts through the noise. You should be comfortable jumping between formats - from deep-dive whitepapers to quirky social ideas.
* Automation & AI: We believe in working efficiently. You’ll be expected to use AI and automation to scale your output, ensuring we spend our time on creativity and strategy rather than manual tasks.
* Sales Support: You’ll help our sales team win by creating the decks, battlecards, and tools they need to communicate our value clearly.
* Creative Problem Solving: Use your creative muscles to find "non-obvious" ways to reach our ICP. Whether it’s a unique content format or a clever distribution play, you think outside the standard B2B playbook.


**Job qualifications and requirements**
* 4–5 years of experience in a similar position within B2B SaaS or a similar fast-paced environment. You’ve ideally been through a startup journey before and know how to deliver when there is no existing playbook.
* A Versatile Crafter: You can switch between formal, technical authority and a more engaging, human tone. You aren't afraid to try unexpected creative ideas to get attention.
* A Pragmatic Builder: You’re happy to be strategic, but also equally enthusiastic about hands-on, crafting and building things.
* Product-Minded: You have a natural curiosity for how things work and how they solve actual problems for real people. Collaborating closely with Product and UX teams.
* AI-Fluent: You’ve already integrated AI into your tech stack to make yourself faster, more creative and efficient. You understand the power and have the ability to automate tasks and workflows so you can focus on more important aspects of your day-to-day.
* Customer Focused: You are obsessed with understanding customers, driven by their real pain and needs, and can articulate their problems better than they can themselves.
* Communication: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills, including presentation abilities.


**Why Join Verified?**
 The Journey: We are on a high-growth trajectory, backed by Verdane, targeting a massive market with high ambitions.
   

  

 The Impact: With Product and Content Marketing as a blank canvas, you'll have the freedom and responsibility to build a high-performing engine and drive real change.
   

  

 Culture of Excellence: We value builders. If you thrive on autonomy, technical mastery and the challenge of scaling a technical product, you’ll find your home here.

title: Global Digital Business Intern (E-COM & Marketplace)
description:
**BabyBjörn is looking for a full-time Global Digital Business Intern (E-COM & Marketplace) to be part of the Global Digital Team based in Stockholm.** 




  





 Job Type: 4-6 month Internship
 



  





 As a Digital Business Intern, you will gain hands-on experience in various aspects under global digital business covering E-com and marketplaces. You will have the opportunity to explore and develop skills across multiple areas, including E-com & Marketplace content, merchandizing, UX&UI, data analyzing, SEO&GEO. You will also participate in global projects and joining regular meetings with global colleagues.
 



  





**What you might be doing in your role:** 



* Contribute to content execution and merchandising across global e‑commerce and marketplace platforms.
* Participate in website testing and assist with conversion rate optimization efforts.
* Support data analysis activities, including GA4, A/B testing, SEO analytics, and user testing.
* Provide support on SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) topics
* Assist with UX and UI research and design activities.
* Conduct research on relevant digital business topics, such as emerging digital trends, market expansion, and competitor analysis.
* Collaborate with cross‑functional teams on digital business projects and participate in global team meetings.



  





**What skills will help you be successful:** 



* You’re currently pursuing a degree in business, digital business, E-commerce or digital marketing.
* You are passionate about digital business—particularly E‑commerce and marketplaces—and stay curious about new digital trends.
* You are a strong team player with a positive mindset and enjoy collaborating across global markets.
* You are eager to learn, take the ownership and demonstrate an entrepreneurial mindset.
* You are fluent in English; additional languages are considered an advantage.



  





**The internship MUST be part of your education/university program as it is unpaid.** 




  





**In your application, we want you to include:** 



* What are you studying, and what is the purpose of your internship?
* Whether the internship is connected to a school project?
* Why do you want to do your internship with us?



  





 As Global Digital Business Intern, you will be reporting to the Global Digital Project Lead and you will be based at the BabyBjörn HQ in Stockholm (Sundbyberg), Sweden.
 



  





 We are accepting applications for this position until
 **1st of June, 2026** 
 , but we will start interviewing applicants before that time.
 



  





**We look forward to receiving your application!** 




  





*Important information when submitting an application to BabyBjörn AB:* 




*By submitting an application, you consent to BabyBjörn AB storing and potentially using your personal data for recruitment purposes for a period of 24 months following the date on which the data was obtained. Your personal data will not be processed for any purpose other than that previously stated, and your data will not be transferred to a third party. For more information about where and for how long we process your personal data, as well as more information about your rights regarding erasure and data portability, please contact us at mydata@babybjorn.com.* 




  





*BabyBjörn AB is a Swedish, family-owned company that has around 190 employees within its Group and develops, markets, and distributes children’s products, primarily for the age group 0-3 years. The company was founded in 1961, and since then more than 50 million children have been carried in our baby carriers. We have a turnover today of more than SEK 1 billion, and 95% of our sales are exports to more than fifty countries. As we exist for all types of families, no matter their structure, lifestyle, or identity, we strive for this to be reflected in our organization as well.* 




*More information is available at www.babybjorn.com*

title: Senior Product Manager-Tech
description:
At Betsson Group, the Player Rewards and Gamification Area ensures our customers come back for more! It’s all about loyalty. We provide a world class customer experience beyond the game play featuring exciting features like tournament, dynamic personalised campaigns and much more! We also work closely with our Commercial, Compliance and Data teams to build the next generation back-office tools to support their processes.
 


**The Wow** 

 As our Senior Product Manager, you will be a part of a cross functional development team where you will have the primary responsibility for defining, organising and prioritising requirements. You will work closely with business stakeholders within the organisation, as well as developers, architects and UX designers to continuously optimise the customer experience.
 



 Together with your team you will take ownership of a number of customer journeys and/or capabilities where you will be one of the key people expected to drive and lead the delivery of new functionality as well as improvements of existing functionality. This will often require you to collaborate with other development teams and engage with a number of stakeholders to ensure a successful roll out. We operate in a fast paced and challenging industry, and you will have several opportunities to work on complex and cutting edge products and contribute to Betsson Group’s success.
 



  
 


**A taster of what you will be involved with** 
* Proactively get input from relevant Business Units on operational needs and problems that need to be solved
* Align requirements, scope, and plan with company-wide initiatives
* Conduct competitors’ analysis
* Lead User Research, experimentation, A/B testing, UAT initiatives
* Own Product Roadmap and prioritization
* Set and track Product KPIs and Success Metrics for product deliveries
* Communicate iteratively on Roadmap changes and deliveries
* Working with UX and UI designers (and other stakeholders as necessary) to define the customer experience and product specifications
* Defining user stories with acceptance criteria together with the development team
* Defining tracking, reporting, and non-functional requirements for user stories
* Working with the team to refine, plan and prioritise user stories according to business value, always taking technical debt and the long term success of the product into account
* Collaborating with stakeholders and ensuring that they are kept up to date and aligned with the current progress and prioritization
* Helping the rest of the development team and Product Management peers to ensure that acceptance criteria are met
* Occasional travelling be required to our various offices



  
 


**What we are looking for** 
* Prior software engineering experience or education.
* Collaboration and dialogue. You will be collaborating both with members of your development team, stakeholders outside the team as well as third party providers and partners
* Agile. Not just processes but a true agile mind-set where all members of the cross functional development team are involved and where changing requirements based on business needs and market opportunities are embraced
* Facilitating and creating workshops materials
* Prioritizing and taking educated decisions
* Collaborating with development teams
* Problem solving and tough conversations. We work in a high paced industry and having more requirements and expectations than capacity is the norm. You will play a key role in managing expectations and ensuring a sustainable pace in your team.
* You are technical enough to manage software product – backend, back-office, and player-facing features for the enterprise platform
* Understanding of APIs, SQL, event-based services and various API exploration tools, like Postman, Swagger, LINQ Pad or similar is a must due to most of functionality is in the backend and API, with limited exposure to UI
* Transactional business rules and algorithmic thinking
* Defining observability, logging requirements, coming up with metrics, alerts ad defining deviations from normal performance of the system.
* Good understanding and ability to define non-functional requirements is a must
* Analysing legal and regulatory requirements
* Product Discovery, Product Planning, and delivery tools (like Jira, Confluence, Miro or similar)
* Thorough documentation of decisions, requirements, analysis and dependencies
* Creating audience-specific presentations and workshop materials
* Gaming, Payments, Revenue Recognition and Accounting, Taxation, CRM, SAAS experience is a big plus



  
 


**What we offer** 

 Much like riding a rollercoaster, sometimes life at Betsson can be lightning fast with twists and turns but always FUN! Then again, what else would you expect from a business 75% millennial and 1700 strong, spread across 7 offices with 900 based out of our Malta HQ alone! We recognise it may not be for the faint-hearted, but if you’re a go-getter, initiator and adrenaline junkie, always striving to push the boundaries and challenge yourself, then you’ll fit right in.
 



  
 


 Challenge accepted?
 
***By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy***

title: 3D Artist Internship
description:
Hology Interactive
 
 is revolutionizing 3D development to make it easier for creators, educators, web developers, designers, and artists to build projects and experiences for everyone to enjoy using web technologies. We are seeking passionate and innovative student interns to join our team and craft immersive 3D experiences using our proprietary Hology Engine. This internship offers a unique opportunity to gain invaluable hands-on experience in the rapidly evolving field of interactive 3D technology while contributing to our product's development.
 




  






 We are looking for a stylized 3D artist intern to assist with our PC game demo
   






**As an intern, you will:** 



* Create mid to low poly 3D assets following our production workflow, optimized for PC/Mobile/Web. Intern will work on specific items that they are allowed to show in their portfolio after completion of the internship
* Create clean UVs and prepare assets for game integration
* Create and apply textures and materials that match our stylized art direction
* Research historical records, architectural concepts, fine art techniques, animal anatomy, and other necessary foundational knowledge to proceed with the project.
* Assist with creating tutorials on subjects related to 3D modeling and materials
* Assist with play testing sessions and receive feedback from users



  





**Technical Skills and Experience** 



* Familiarity with Blender
* Understanding of clean topology and basic game optimization practices
* Flexibility to adapt to new game engines and tools such as Affinity, InstaMat
* Ability to follow and match an established art direction



  





**Bonus:** 

 simple rigging and animation in Blender, familiarity with version control tools such as GitHub, and/or web programming experience
 




  





**Personal Attributes** 



* Adaptability and enthusiasm for exploring diverse technologies and tools
* Strong self-motivation and ability to work independently
* Exceptional problem-solving skills and meticulous attention to detail
* Patient and logical thinking
* Curious and willing to deep dive with research into specific subject matter
* Ability to accept feedback and follow directions



**Additional Details** 



* Duration: 10 weeks summer internship or 6 months LIA
* You have to be a current student who needs LIA or internship credit for a university or vocational school
* Location: This is remote work with some in-person events/meetings in Stockholm
* Start Date: May or June, 2026. Negotiable
* The working language is English. Bonus: Knowledge in Swedish, Mandarin (Traditional), or Japanese
* Flexible daily hours with prior agreement
* Mentorships in UX design in a 3D environment, portfolio/CV review, composition, subject specific topics, shaders, and more
* Days off in accordance with your educational institution's policy



 Contact Us
 


 Please send your CV in PDF format and portfolio link to
 

 hello@hology.app
 

 with the subject line “ (Your Name): Summer 3D Artist Internship.”

title: PRAKTIK/LIA - inom UX-design på enheten för spektrumtillstånd på PTS
description:
Vill du göra praktik på en plats där du verkligen får vara med och påverka? Hos Post- och telestyrelsen (PTS) får du chansen att omsätta dina kunskaper i verkligheten och samtidigt få en unik inblick i hur det är att jobba på en statlig myndighet. Som praktikant hos oss blir du en del av vardagen direkt. Du får testa dina idéer, arbeta i spännande uppdrag och lära av kollegor som gärna delar med sig av sin kunskap. Här är det helt okej att vara ny – vi förväntar oss inte att du kan allt, men nyfikenhet och vilja att utvecklas är viktigare än erfarenhet.
   

  

 Vi tror på balans i livet. Hos oss finns det utrymme för både jobb och fritid, och du blir en del av en trygg arbetsmiljö där vi samarbetar, lär av varandra och har roligt tillsammans.
   

  

 På enheten för spektrumtillstånd får du möjlighet att arbeta med UX-design kopplat till verksamhetens ärendehanteringssystem och interna digitala verktyg. Du kommer att bidra i arbetet med att analysera användarbehov, kartlägga arbetsflöden och identifiera förbättringsområden i både gränssnitt och processer. Arbetet sker nära verksamheten där du får möjlighet att ta fram designförslag, prototyper och bidra i utvärdering och vidareutveckling av lösningar ur ett användarperspektiv.
   

  

**Vi söker dig**
 som är nyfiken, initiativtagande och gillar att samarbeta. Hos oss är det viktigt att våga ställa frågor, dela med sig av idéer och bidra till en positiv arbetsmiljö. Du trivs i en vardag där du får sätta dig in i komplexa sammanhang, är flexibel och vill utvecklas tillsammans med teamet, samtidigt som du tar ansvar för dina uppgifter och bidrar till vårt gemensamma uppdrag.
   

  

 Vi vill också att:
   

  

* Din universitets-/högskoleutbildning är inom UX-design, interaktionsdesign, tjänstedesign, digital design eller motsvarande där praktik/LIA ingår.
* Du har grundläggande kunskaper inom användarcentrerad design, exempelvis användarbehov, användarresor (user journey) och användbarhet.
* Du har erfarenhet av designverktyg som Figma, Balsamiq eller liknande.


 Det är även meriterande om du har:
   

  

* Tidigare praktik, projekt eller arbetslivserfarenhet inom UX, design eller digital produktutveckling.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med användarstudier, intervjuer eller testning av designlösningar.
* Erfarenhet av att kartlägga arbetsflöden eller processer (t.ex. användarfall / user journeys).
* Vana att arbeta i Figma, Balsamiq eller andra prototypverktyg.
* Erfarenhet av att samarbeta med olika roller, exempelvis utvecklare eller verksamhetsrepresentanter.


**Bra att veta**
 Praktikplatsen/LIA är i Stockholm och vårt praktikprogram riktar sig till studenter på universitet, högskola eller yrkesutbildning inom UX som är inskrivna på en kurs där praktik/LIA ingår. Innan du börjar din praktik behöver du kunna intyga att du är antagen eller registrerad på en praktikkurs, alternativt att du är berättigad praktik. Som praktikant hos PTS är du tryggt försäkrad via din skola. Praktikperioden omfattar cirka 10 veckor från vecka 37.
   

  

 Eftersom det inte är ett anställningsförhållande ingår ingen ekonomisk ersättning eller andra förmåner som lön, traktamente vid resor, utlägg för mat vid resor eller restidsersättning.
   

  

 För att vi ska kunna göra en rättvis och objektiv bedömning av din kompetens ber vi dig att inte inkludera bild, personnummer eller adress i ditt CV. Vi har valt att inte efterfråga personligt brev, utan använder istället urvalsfrågor – allt för att processen ska bli så effektiv och rättvis som möjligt. Tester kommer också att ingå i processen. Om du har skyddade uppgifter, kontakta gärna vår HR-specialist.
   

  

 För ytterligare information, kontakta ansvarig för praktikplatsen Fatos Lloncari, på fatos.lloncari@pts.se alternativt HR-specialist Denise Brosché, på denise.brosche@pts.se
   

  

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan senast den 30 april.** 
 Klicka här för att se filmen om oss:
 **Vi är PTS**

title: Digital Communications Manager
description:
**Description**
 Welcome to SSC Space (formerly Swedish Space Corporation), the perfect workplace for those passionate about technology in general and space in particular.
   

  

 With space organizations, research institutes, institutional and commercial actors as customers, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications, spacecraft consulting services, rocket and balloon systems, and much more.
   

  

 SSC Space also has one of the world’s largest global networks of ground stations for satellite communications. We own and operate the Esrange Space Center in Kiruna, northern Sweden, with the aim of launching satellites in the near future.
   

  

 Are you fueled by a passion for people and the ambition to create an awesome workplace?
   

  

 Are you ready to embark on an exciting journey with us to help Earth benefit from space?
   

  

 If you answer yes to these questions, we invite you to seize the opportunity to make a significant impact as Digital Communications Manager, where you will lead digital targeted campaigns, and content optimization of our digital platforms, and distribution across multiple channels.
   

  

 In this role, you will plan, execute, and optimize campaigns, ensuring messaging reaches the right audiences with impact. You will work cross-functionally with internal teams, and of course with colleagues in Communications.
   

  

 With vast experience in digital content creation, and platform management, you possess exceptional writing skills that enable you to translate corporate strategies into engaging, on-brand digital content.
   

  

 As a social media pro, you have a deep understanding of how to set up and target effective content across existing and emerging platforms. With an analytical mindset, you are comfortable working with data, dashboards, and A/B testing to drive continuous improvements.
   

  

**Requirements**
* Extensive experience in digital marketing, communications, or related field.
* Strong knowledge of SEO, SEM, web analytics, and UX principles.
* Hands-on experience with social media management, digital advertising, and content creation.
* Experience with digital tools such as CMS platforms, analytics dashboards, and campaign management tools.
* Excellent writing and storytelling skills in English (additional languages a plus).
* Creative mindset with an analytical approach to measuring success.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced environment.


**Responsibilities**
* Ensure effective distribution of content across websites, social media, newsletters, campaign pages, and external platforms.
* Lead SEO/UX/SEM, and marketing automation to support lead generation, and overall digital performance.
* Plan, produce and execute integrated digital communications and marketing campaigns across external channels.
* Analyze performance, reach, and engagement, using insights to optimize campaigns and distribution.
* Manage and grow our social media presence, driving engagement and community interaction.
* Work with the Digital Platform Specialist on development and operations of digital platforms and tools (e.g., website, CMS, DAM, newsletters, marketing automation).


**Benefits**
 We offer you
   

  

* A unique opportunity to contribute to a wide range of projects and play an active role in both the Swedish and international space industry.
* An excellent opportunity for personal and career development.
* An exciting, international workplace characterized by an open atmosphere and proud employees all over the world.


**Additional benefits**
* In addition to vacation and traditional public holidays, we offer extra paid leave throughout the year, such as time off between Christmas and New Year, Ascension Day, amounting to 6-11 extra days depending on the calendar.
* Wellness allowance of SEK 5,000 per year.
* Health benefits such as voluntary health insurance and regular health checks for eligible employees.
* Access to a benefit bike through a tax-efficient leasing program.
* Support for employee-driven activities that promote connection, health, and culture across teams.
* Collective Agreement, including good pensions plans, parental pay and insurance.


 Location
   

  

 This is a full-time, permanent position based at our office in Solna.
   

  

 Further information
   

  

 For questions regarding employment terms or union-related matters, you are welcome to contact our union representatives:
   

  

 Sveriges Ingenjörer: SverigesIngenjorer-AF@sscspace.com
   

  

 Unionen: unionen@sscspace.com
   

  

**Next step**
 If this opportunity sparks your interest, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible! We review applications continuously and will conduct interviews throughout the process.
   

  

 You can submit your application up until 2026-05-17, which is the latest possible date for consideration.
   

  

 Please note, however, that the position may be filled before this date, and the advertisement may therefore close earlier. This allows us to manage the process efficiently and give each application the attention it deserves.
   

  

 When applying, please include your CV. While you are welcome to include a brief personal note or letter, our evaluation will primarily focus on your skills and qualifications as outlined in your CV, ensuring a fair and unbiased recruitment process.
   

  

 This position requires approved pre-employment screening. These controls are based on the role that you will fulfill within the company. Additional requirements regarding citizenship may apply.
   

  

**We help Earth benefit from Space**
 SSC Space is a leading global provider of advanced space services, with more than 50 years of experience. We help space organizations, research institutes, commercial and institutional actors from all over the world to get access to space.
   

  

 With local presence on all continents and about 750 committed employees, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications and satellite control services, spacecraft operations, rocket and balloon systems, launch services and flight test services, as well as engineering, operations and consultancy services for space missions.
   

  

 Learn more at sscspace.com

title: Frontend Engineer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 As we continue scaling, our frontend experience becomes even more critical. In FinTech, clarity builds trust, and great user interfaces directly impact how customers experience our platform.
   

  

 We are now looking for a
 **Frontend Engineer** 
 to join our Tech team. In this role, you will own and develop multiple frontend applications, creating intuitive and responsive user interfaces that deliver great user experiences in the FinTech space.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who cares about both clean code and clean design.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**Some Of The Main Responsibilities You Will Cover**
* Design, develop, and maintain frontend applications and user interfaces.
* Own multiple frontend projects and ensure consistent design quality.
* Build responsive web applications that work seamlessly across desktop and mobile.
* Collaborate with designers and backend engineers to deliver cohesive products.
* Implement and maintain automated tests for frontend code.
* Perform code reviews and contribute hands-on to projects.
* Leverage AI agents and tools to enhance development workflows and productivity.
* Document frontend architecture, design patterns, and component libraries.


 Success means users experience our platform as intuitive, trustworthy, and technically solid across devices and markets.
   

  

**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
*We are seeking a motivated and skilled Frontend Engineer who is passionate about creating beautiful, functional user interfaces. You have a strong eye for design and excel at translating design mockups into polished, interactive experiences.*
**We Believe That You Have**
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* 5+ years of experience in frontend development.
* Strong skills in JavaScript and modern frontend frameworks (React, Vue, or similar).
* Strong skills in CSS, including responsive design for desktop and mobile, and CSS-in-JS or preprocessors (Sass, Less).
* Experience with HTML5 and semantic markup.
* Familiarity with frontend build tools and bundlers (Webpack, Vite, or similar).
* Experience with version control (Git) and collaborative workflows.
* Understanding of web accessibility standards (WCAG).
* Experience working with design tools (Figma).
* Proven ability to translate designs into high-quality implementations following best practices.
* Excellent English communication skills (Swedish is a plus).
* Enthusiasm for using AI agents and tools in daily development work.
* UX design experience is a plus.
* TypeScript experience is a plus.
* Backend experience (Ruby on Rails, Go, or Python) is a plus.
* Experience in FinTech is a plus.


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, you'll have the opportunity to work in a cutting-edge, fast-growing FinTech company that's redefining the credit scoring industry. With the backing of major investors and a clear vision for the future, your work will make a real impact on financial inclusion worldwide. Join us and be a part of something truly transformative!
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q1/Q2 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s VP Engineering
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our Co-founder/CTO, arlen@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: SAP Professionals and Specialists -2026
description:
SEKROND AB provides services in the form of Technology Consulting and Outsourcing, Management Consulting, Product development and other similar activities in ICT, Telecommunications, Financial, Renewable/Non-renewable Energy spheres as well as Sales, marketing and maintenance of ICT software and hardware to clients.
  
We are hiring energetic and solution driven SAP professionals for the following positions:
  
SAP FICO Specialist

Qualifications and Expertise Desired
  
SAP FICO Specialist
  
Bachelor or Master Degree in IT, Computer Science, Software Engineering, Finance or relevant education or work experience.
  
Good communication skills in English. Swedish Language skills would be an added advantage.
  
At least 10 years’ experience in SAP FICO modules with configuration, implementation, and maintenance, including at least 3 full cycle SAP successful project implementations.
  
Business understanding and current hands on experience in finance business areas such as AP, AR, GL, AA, CO etc in SAP systems.
  
Experience of finance processes and in-depth knowledge of finance master data objects.
  
Working knowledge of ABAP on HANA, End-to-End S/4HANA system and conversions ,understands the intricacies of Finance data and has worked in high-volume retail environments with large transactional footprints, complex integrations, and strict downtime constraints (including Near-Zero-Downtime concepts).
  
Deep knowledge in how FICO modules are fed with transactions from other modules such as SD/MM/PM.
  
Experience with data management in SAP S4/HANA (esp. Vendor Master Data), data quality (5+ years)
  
Excellent understanding of SAP information Architecture and Analytics knowledge (SAP Fiori, SAP Analytics Cloud)
  
Experience from Agile way of working (SAFe or similar)
  
  

SAP Solution Architect/Developer
  
Bachelor or Master Degree in IT, Computer Science, Software Engineering, Finance or relevant education or work experience.
  
Good communication skills in English. Swedish Language skills would be an added advantage.
  
Strong Technical expertise in SAP ABAP development, WRICEF objects (Workflows, Reports, Interfaces, Conversions, Enhancements, and Forms)
  
At least 10 years’ Functional Knowledge in SD/MM/FI/ CO/SCM/EWM/APO/GTS areas.
  
Working knowledge of ABAP on HANA and OOABAP CDS Views and Extension
  
Working knowledge of WebDypro ABAP/FPM Applications.
  
Strong development proficiency in ABAP OO, Business Object Processing Framework )BOPF, Business Rules Framework (BRF+), CDS Views & OData, FPM / UI enhancements, and Fiori/UI5 development.
  
Business understanding and current hands on experience in finance business areas such as AP, AR, GL, AA, CO etc in SAP systems.
  
In-depth knowledge of finance data models in SAP S/4 HANA.
  
Strong experience and knowledge working with DevOps principles and SAP integrations including SAP CPI, API, Kafka, Cloud platforms and Event Mesh.
  
Experience within Master Data Management and working knowledge of design and implementation of data governance policies and procedures to ensure data quality and accuracy.
  
Experience in data model definition along SAP best practices and standard system capabilities.
  
Extensive SAP Retail design and implementation experience, having successfully executed at least 3 SAP Retail full life cycle implementation projects including integration experience with POS and e-Commerce applications.
  
Excellent understanding of SAP information Architecture and Analytics knowledge (SAP Fiori, SAP Analytics Cloud)
  
Experience from Agile way of working (SAFe or similar)
  
  

SAP Program/Project Manager
  
Bachelor or Master Degree in IT, Computer Science, Software Engineering, Finance or relevant education or work experience.
  
Good communication skills in English. Swedish Language skills would be an added advantage.
  
At least 10 years’ experience in SAP FICO modules with configuration, implementation, and maintenance, including at least 3 full cycle SAP successful project implementations.
  
PMP or PRINCE2 Certification is mandatory. Also working knowledge of Agile Software Development is desired.
  
Experience with Project Planning and Leadership, Change Management (PROSCI), Stakeholder coordination, Technical oversight of tactical and operational requirements, and expertise in program execution for large Enterprise systems (ERP, CRM,etc)
  
Working experience of data governance tools, frameworks and technologies.
  
Excellent understanding of SAP information Architecture and Analytics knowledge (SAP Fiori, SAP Analytics Cloud)
  
Experience from Agile way of working (SAFe or similar)
  
  

Kindly send your resumes to info@sekrond.com. Only applications sent to the mailbox will be reviewed.
  
  

Kindly quote SEKROICT2026-SAP as reference in the applications.

Vi fokuserar på din kompetens, inte dina övriga förutsättningar. Vi är öppna för att anpassa rollen eller arbetsplatsen efter dina behov.

title: Cloud Data Engineer within Data & Analytics to Customer Relationship Management Tribe | SEB, Solna
description:
*SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you'll be interested in this opportunity!*  



**About the role**

The Cloud Data Engineering Team within Customer Relationship Management (CRM) Tribe consists of vibrant, ambitious, and extremely friendly future colleagues gathering and providing datasets within the tribe for discovering customer insights and supporting agility around our interactions with both current and potential customers. We work continually to provide these data insights with the goals of building sound customer relationships, improving customer experience and welcoming new customers to SEB. Join us, and with your knowledge and experience we can realize even more possibilities.


**What you’ll do**


* Be part of our amazing Cloud Data Engineering Team of 4-6 members dedicated to providing the data needed to drive our Customer Relationship Management activities.
* Work with a broad tech stack including: Git, CI/CD, Python, Kafka, Containers, RESTful APIs, API architecture, BigQuery, Terraform and Dataform.
* Have primary focus on the development of our GCP-based analytical platform products within our cloud data portfolio.
* Broaden your exposure and engagement by working cross team with our other products within our cloud data portfolio.
* Work with standard methodologies around continuous integration to manage products deployed on GCP.
* Gain a deep understanding of our CRM processes, the data available and how this can be used to continually support amazing customer experiences.
* Proactively drive technical solutions within the team.
* Be part of an inspiring work environment in a team that encourages both individual and collective growth and learning.
* Continuously learn new skills through our developer communities, internal workshops, courses, hackathons, innovation weeks and tech guilds.

  


**To thrive in this role, we believe:**


* You have a relevant data engineering background and experience building and optimizing data pipelines and working with data warehouse and BI environments.
* You are fascinated by learning, gaining, and sharing knowledge.
* You have experience working with ETL/ELT processes.
* You value innovative solutions that push your knowledge and experience to the limit.
* You have experience working with cloud platforms and technologies, preferably GCP (Google Cloud Platform).
* You have experience with Python and Terraform and are skilled at SQL.
* You have experience of and value agile methodologies and ways of working.
* You have knowledge and passion for best practices like continuous delivery, continuous integration and automated testing and monitoring.
* You are happy working both independently and collaboratively.
* You know and understand the importance of the tradeoffs between the perfect and a working solution.

  


**What we offer**
* Extensive training and learning opportunities.
* Work-lifebalance.
* International opportunities and working environment.
* Access to SEB staff banking with exclusive benefits.
* Innovative company in forefront of technology.


Learn more about working at SEB www.sebgroup.com/career It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.

  


**Ready to take the next step on your career journey?**

Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than **2026-05-11**. If you have questions about the position, please contact Tuula Söderblom, tuula.söderblom@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.



Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.



SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

title: Senior Sourcing Manager IT
description:
We’re looking for a **Senior Sourcing Manager IT** to join us at Telia.


Would you like to join a team of other passionate sourcing managers and work with key IT deliveries? Then this could be the perfect role for you!


We are looking for a Senior IT Sourcing Manager for our Group Sourcing organization with a strong sense of business acumen and great stakeholder management skills. At Telia Sourcing & Supply Chain we strive to be the value engine of the company and we are excited to invite you on this journey!


**What you’ll do:**

* As a Senior Sourcing Manager at Telia you will work very closely with the business to ensure that your strategic capabilities are contributing to the success of both our stakeholders and customers, which can be found across our multi-country footprint.
* You will be working in a tight team with high seniority and skills within the field of Sourcing and Category Management. Where we will have the strongest strategic focus going forward is in the domains of Software and Services, hence special focus will be on skills within those domains.
* We are a flexible team and tailor responsibilities to the strengths of our individuals, thus combined with that we manage the full portfolio of strategic global vendors there won’t be a shortage of challenges to take on for the right person.
* You will be reporting to Head of Sourcing IT and belong to a team of 13 seasoned sourcing managers. In addition, you will be contributing to a team culture and spirit that is strongly encompassed by two of our company values; Dare and Care.

**What will help you thrive in this role:**

* We think that you have a passion for sourcing and commercial strategy and are driven by contributing to the success of others.
* As this is a senior position a minimum 5 years of senior experience in the field of IT Sourcing is required as well as relevant university degree, in addition to an in depth understanding of IT Services deliveries and software sourcing.
* Experience in category management and an analytical mindset are traits that will help you on the road to success.

If you are someone who thrives on new challenges, has a large portion of self leadership and finds executive collaboration a thrill; then this is certainly a great opportunity for you!


**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**

At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a **Top Employer and Sustainability Leader** , we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world.


Here, you can **grow your skills, lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive, diverse environment.** Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.


**What we offer**

At Telia, we care about your well-being, growth, and sense of belonging:


* **Additional** **health insurance** and pension plans
* **Workation** : work from anywhere in the EU for up to 30 days per year
* **Extra vacation days** based on tenure (up to 5 additional days)
* **Discounts on Telia services** , including free home internet
* **Partner offers** and discounts (SPA, cafes, events)
* **Telia Kids Club** : summer camps for employees’ children
* **Company-supported sports activities** (yoga, basketball, running)
* **Internal training** , leadership programs and job shadowing to explore new roles
* **Free on-site charging stations for electric vehicles** – available for both work-related and personal use.

… and more .


**Monthly salary range for this position 3320-4980 Eur (gross) + annual performance/sales bonuses** . Although it may vary depending on your skills and experience.


**Ready to make better happen?**

We look forward to receiving your application by **08.05.2026** . Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!


If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our **Talent Acquisition Partner** . Background and reference checks will be part of the process.


Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to **Mikael Naurin, Head of Sourcing IT,** at **mikael.naurin@teliacompany.com** .


**Equal opportunities**

At Telia, we recognize talent by **professional skills and growth potential.** We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where **your uniqueness is our strength.**

**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

**More about our culture:** www.telia.lt/karjera
