title: Senior Devops Manager
description:
**Epassi’s purpose is to boost everyday well-being** 
 .
   

  

 We are a leading provider of employee benefit solutions in Europe. We were established in Finland in 2007, and in 2008 we were the first company to launch a mobile-payable employee benefit payment solution in Europe. Since then, we have consistently grown, diversifying our products and introducing our services into new markets. Epassi has been awarded by the Financial Times as one of the fastest-growing companies in Europe on multiple occasions.
   

  

**Epassi’s** 
 purpose is to boost everyday well-being. We are a leading provider of employee benefit solutions across Europe. Founded in Finland in 2007, we were the first company in Europe (2008) to launch a mobile-payable employee benefit payment solution. Epassi has been recognized by the Financial Times as one of Europe’s fastest-growing companies multiple times.
   

  

 Join one of Europe’s fastest-growing companies and help boost the wellbeing of millions of employees. You’ll work in a fast-paced, international environment where you can make a direct impact on scalable, secure digital services.
   

  

 We are currently hiring a
 **Devops Lead** 
 to be based in either Finland, Sweden or Germany!
   

  

**Your mission**
 As a
 **DevOps Lead,** 
 you will strengthen Epassi’s technology foundation and accelerate delivery of secure, high-quality, scalable services across Europe. You will lead and mentor a growing DevOps team, evolve our CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure, and shape DevSecOps and AI-assisted engineering practices.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead and mentor the DevOps team; foster collaboration, learning, and high performance
* Own and evolve cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines for fast, reliable automated delivery
* Drive DevSecOps practices; embed security throughout the software lifecycle
* Introduce and scale AI-assisted engineering practices to improve productivity and quality
* Partner with engineering, product, and security on priorities, architecture, and best practices
* Ensure observability, reliability, and performance via monitoring and incident management
* Champion automation and resilience; reduce operational toil and bottlenecks
* Contribute to long-term technology strategy and platform decisions


**What Success Looks Like**
* A thriving DevOps team with strong ways of working and continuous learning
* Faster, smoother releases with fewer bottlenecks and stronger collaboration
* Security embedded into everyday engineering practices
* Practical adoption of AI-assisted engineering with measurable impact
* Robust, scalable cloud platform ready for growth across Europe


**What You Bring**
* Several years of hands-on DevOps experience in a modern software environment
* Experience leading or mentoring DevOps/SRE/Platform teams (scaling environment preferred)
* Strong knowledge of cloud, IaC, containers, CI/CD, and observability
* Experience with DevSecOps and secure software lifecycle practices
* Familiarity with AI-assisted engineering tools/workflows (coding, testing, automation)
* Pragmatic mindset and strong stakeholder collaboration skills


**Competencies**
* Proactivity
* Technical leadership
* Collaboration & communication
* Analytical problem-solving
* Coaching & team development
* Security & reliability mindset


**Why join Epassi**
* Purpose-driven work: boosting everyday wellbeing
* Open, inclusive culture with low hierarchy
* Strong growth and opportunity to make an impact
* Wellbeing-focused environment and benefits


 Hiring manager & contact
   

  

**Hiring manager:** 
 Pekka Pietikäinen, Head of Group IT
   

  

**Contact:** 
 careers@epassi.com

title: IT Platform Specialist – DevOps & Infrastruktur
description:
*Vi driver utvecklingen av nästa generations hållbara informationssamhälle​ Ida Infront är ett väletablerat företag som verkar inom offentlig sektor i Norden. Med produkter baserade på iipax erbjuder vi nutidens och nästa generations digitala lösningar inom säkert informationsutbyte, effektiv ärendehantering och hållbar e-arkivering till samhället.​ Ida Infront grundades 1984 och har i dag ca 140 medarbetare i Linköping, Stockholm och Mumbai. Företaget är en del av Addnode Group vars aktie är noterad på Nasdaq Stockholm​*




 Vill du arbeta i en bred och tekniskt djup roll där du kombinerar
 **klassisk IT-drift** 
 med moderna 
 **DevOps- och plattformsprinciper** 
 ?
   

 Nu söker vi en
 **IT Platform Specialist med stark DevOps-profil** 
 , där drift av
 **Kubernetes** 
 ,
 **Jenkins** 
 ,
 **CI/CD** 
   & Linux är centrala delar – tillsammans med ett tydligt ansvar för den dagliga driften av vår IT-infrastruktur.
   

  





 Hos oss får du arbeta nära både användare och utvecklingsteam och bidra till stabila, säkra och välfungerande plattformar som används i verksamhetens kärnprocesser.
 


**Om rollen**

 Rollen är placerad inom
 **Team IT Platform** 
 och kombinerar:
 


* Drift och förvaltning av IT-infrastruktur
* Plattformsteknik och automation
* DevOps-samarbete med utvecklingsteam



 Du blir en del av ett självorganiserande team som ansvarar för både
 **stabil daglig drift** 
 och
 **kontinuerlig förbättring av plattformar och arbetssätt** 
 .
   

  





 Rollen innebär en naturlig variation mellan planerat utvecklingsarbete och mer operativa uppgifter kopplade till incidenter, förändringar och supportflöden.
 


**Arbetsuppgifter**

 I rollen som IT Platform Specialist kommer du bland annat att arbeta med:
   

  





**Drift, support och infrastruktur** 



* Drift, övervakning och underhåll av IT-infrastruktur och plattformar
* Hantering av incidenter och requests via helpdesk, inklusive felsökning och åtgärd
* Patchning, uppgraderingar och livscykelhantering av system och servrar
* Backup-, redundans- och återställningslösningar
* Dokumentation av system, konfigurationer och rutiner



**Plattform, automation och DevOps** 



* Drift och vidareutveckling av
 **Kubernetes-baserade miljöer**
* Bygga, underhålla och förbättra
 **CI/CD-pipelines** 
 , främst med
 **Jenkins**
* Automatisering av provisionering, konfiguration och drift med script och verktyg
* Linux-systemadministration i både applikations- och plattformskontext
* Samarbete med utvecklingsteam kring release, deployment och driftbarhet



 Rollen omfattar både
 **on-prem-miljöer och miljöer hos extern driftleverantör** 
 .
   

  





**Säkerhet och efterlevnad** 



* Arbeta med säkerhetskonfiguration, åtkomsthantering och certifikat
* Säkerställa att plattformar följer interna säkerhetskrav och riktlinjer


**Kompetens och erfarenhet**

 Vi söker dig som har:
 


* Gedigen erfarenhet av
 **Linux-baserad drift och systemadministration**
* Erfarenhet av arbete med
 **infrastruktur i produktion**
* Praktisk erfarenhet av drift och uppsättning för
 **Kubernetes** 
 och containerbaserade miljöer
* Erfarenhet av containerteknik (Docker) och plattformsdrift
* Erfarenhet av
 **CI/CD** 
 , gärna
 **Jenkins,** 
 gärna drift och konfigruation.
* Vana av
 **automation och scripting** 
 (t.ex. Bash, Python, Ansible m.m.)
* Förståelse för incident-, change- och requesthantering i IT-drift
* God förståelse för DevOps-principer och samarbetet mellan Dev och Ops



 Meriterande är:
 


* Infrastructure as Code (t.ex. Ansible, Terraform)
* Monitorering, logghantering och observability
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt
* Arbete i miljöer med höga krav på säkerhet och tillgänglighet


**För att lyckas i rollen behöver du även ha**

 (Detta är centrala delar av rollen och inget vi kan lära upp från grunden)
 


* Praktisk erfarenhet av att
 **drifta och vidareutveckla Kubernetes-kluster**
* Erfarenhet av att
 **möjliggöra, standardisera och drifta CI/CD-pipelines i Jenkins**
* Erfarenhet av att
 **felsöka och hantera incidenter i dessa miljöer**



**Viktigt att veta**




 Den här rollen kombinerar DevOps med klassisk drift. Vi söker därför dig som har
 **hands-on erfarenhet av drift i produktionsmiljöer** 
 .
   

  





 Erfarenhet av Kubernetes eller Jenkins enbart från:
 


* utvecklingsprojekt
* labbmiljöer
* eller begränsad användning



 är i regel inte tillräckligt för rollen.
 


**Personliga egenskaper**

 För att trivas i rollen ser vi att du är serviceinriktad och trygg i operativt ansvar. Du är strukturerad och metodisk, även i incidentnära arbete. Samarbetsorienterad, kommunikativ och nyfiken på att förbättra både teknik och arbetssätt.
 


**Vi erbjuder**
* En
 **bred och långsiktig roll** 
 inom IT-plattform och drift
* Möjlighet att arbeta både operativt och utvecklande
* Moderna tekniker i kombination med stabila grundsystem
* Kompetensutveckling och tekniskt inflytande
* Flexibla arbetsformer och möjlighet till distansarbete


**Ansökan**

 Ida Infront anser att mångfald berikar verksamheten och välkomnar sökande med olika bakgrund, kön, erfarenhet samt personliga egenskaper.
   

  





 Urvalet sker löpande så vänta inte med din ansökan.
   

  





 Vid frågor om jobbet eller oss, kontakta rekryterande chef David Lindström, david.lindstrom@idainfront.se

title: Senior DevOps Engineer — Kubernetes platform & GitOps
description:
We’re looking for a Senior DevOps Engineer to join our Platform team at Rillion.
 



  





 Over more than two decades, Rillion has built a robust AP Automation solution that helps our B2B customers streamline invoice processing, reduce manual work, and gain stronger control over their financial operations.
 



  





 Our Product & Engineering department is about 60 people across multiple teams, working on the core products, standalone services, and the underlying infrastructure.
 



  





 As a member of our Platform infrastructure team, you’ll join engineers who build and operate our Azure and Kubernetes-based platform that powers our SaaS product.
 



  





 The team develops shared platform foundations covering automation, security, reliability, and scalability, while balancing legacy setups with modern cloud-native solutions.
 



  





 We work closely with product teams, offering hands-on support and practical expertise so teams can ship with confidence.
 



  





**Who we're looking for** 



* **7+ years of infrastructure experience** 
 , ideally in SaaS environments leveraging modern cloud platforms.
* **Deep, multi-year experience building and running Kubernetes** 
 in production, e.g. cluster operations, multi-tenant namespaces, networking/ingress, RBAC, workload security, certificate management, secrets, policy, etc.
* **Cloud proficiency on Azure, AWS or GCP,** 
 including hands-on work with managed Kubernetes (AKS/EKS/GKE), networking, and security. Azure experience is a strong plus.
* **DevOps practices and tooling** 
 , with experience building CI/CD pipelines (GitHub and Azure DevOps), working with containerized workloads and using Terraform for Infrastructure as Code. Experience in platform engineering tools like Argo CD, Crossplane, and Kargo is a plus.
* **Web application stack knowledge** 
 , with a solid understanding of how applications fit together in a SaaS architecture. Much of our platform is Microsoft and .NET based, alongside services built on Java and Python, including data and AI systems.
* **Security-first thinking** 
 , with experience in identity management, RBAC, and network security in Azure.



  





**What we offer** 



* A chance to join a mature company with a proven business model and a product that is critical to our customers’ daily work.
* A supportive, collaborative product development environment.
* A competitive benefits package, including generous pension and insurance plans.
* A beautiful office in central Stockholm on the 14th floor, with amazing views.
* A hybrid setup with two days per week in the office.



  





*Note: a background check will be conducted for final candidates.* 




  





**About Rillion** 




*We are a global company founded in Sweden with 30 years’ experience in the AP Automation industry. We help finance professionals transform how they manage invoices by digitalizing and automating the entire process.* 




  





*By removing the manual steps of invoice handling, we enable finance teams to save time and effort, reducing the possibility of human error. Because we’re AP professionals ourselves, we understand how to give our customers everything they need, and nothing they don’t.* 




  





*Together with our owners at Altor, we’re on a journey to expand in our home markets, while entering new territories. To complete our mission, we need more talented people!* 




  





*Rillion is an equal opportunity employer. We believe that diversity is integral to our success, and do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, age, or any other basis protected by law.*

title: DevSecOps-ingenjör
description:
**Vill du vara med och bidra till ett säkrare samhälle?** 




 Vi utvecklar marknadens säkraste it-plattform/ PaaS, Craton för organisationer med de högsta skyddskraven. Vi hjälper samhällsviktiga aktörer att skydda sina mest värdefulla tillgångar mot både yttre och inre hot. Genom våra lösningar bidrar vi till att hålla i gång de verksamheter som får samhället att fungera även vid stora störningar eller kriser. Idag är vi ett av landets ledande företag inom verksamhets- och säkerhetsskydd och vi växer.
 



 Om du vill vara med på en spännande utvecklingsresa i rollen som DevSecOps-ingenjör där ditt arbete gör skillnad, då är Basalt platsen för dig. Hos oss får du bygga en stark kompetens inom system som ska leva upp till de högsta säkerhetskraven, ett område med växande betydelse för hela samhället.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 I rollen som DevSecOps-ingenjör på Basalt AB kommer du arbeta med vår plattform Craton, du kan läsa mer om Craton här.
 



  





 Du kommer jobba med att designa, implementera och förvalta säkra utvecklings- och driftsmiljöer baserade på on-prem-infrastruktur. Du fungerar som en teknisk nyckelresurs som driver integrationen av säkerhet i hela mjukvarulivscykeln och bidrar aktivt till omvärldsbevakning samt kunskapsspridning internt och mot kund.
 



  





**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:** 



* Design och implementation av säkra CI/CD-pipelines med automatiserade säkerhetskontroller (SAST, DAST, SCA, secrets scanning).
* Arkitektur och förvaltning av on-prem-infrastruktur med OpenStack och Kubernetes, med säkerhet och skalbarhet i fokus.
* Leda och genomföra hotmodellering, riskanalyser och säkerhetsgranskningar av infrastruktur och applikationer.
* Implementera och förvalta infrastruktur som kod (IaC) med verktyg som Terraform, Pulumi eller Ansible.
* Ansvara för och driva omvärldsbevakning – följa hotlandskapet, analysera nya sårbarheter och trender samt producera rapporter och underlag för interna och externa intressenter.
* Stödja och vägleda kollegor samt bidra till kompetensutveckling inom teamet.
* Driva arbetet med Zero Trust-principer, härdning av miljöer och efterlevnad av relevanta ramverk (t.ex. ISO 27001, NIST, CIS Benchmarks).
* Driva en säker användning av AI i utvecklingsarbetet.



  





**Du ansvarar för att:** 



* Äga och vidareutveckla teamets tekniska processer och verktygskedja inom DevSecOps.
* Säkerställa att säkerhetskrav integreras tidigt i utvecklingsprocessen (shift-left).
* Identifiera, prioritera och driva åtgärdsarbete kring sårbarheter och säkerhetsbrister.
* Sammanställa och kvalitetssäkra omvärldsbevakning till interna rapporter och kundleveranser.
* Dokumentera arkitekturbeslut, säkerhetskrav och driftsprocedurer.



  





**Din bakgrund** 




 För rollen efterfrågas följande kompetens:
 


* Relevant akademisk bakgrund inom datateknik, informationssäkerhet eller motsvarande erfarenhet.
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av DevOps, DevSecOps eller liknande tekniska roller.
* Erfarenhet av att bygga och driftsätta CI/CD-pipelines i verkliga miljöer (t.ex. GitHub Actions, GitLab CI eller Azure DevOps).
* Kunskap inom containerteknologier och orkestrering, i synnerhet Kubernetes i on-prem-miljö, samt tillhörande säkerhetsaspekter.
* Erfarenhet av OpenStack eller liknande plattformar för on-prem-virtualisering.
* Erfarenhet av omvärldsbevakning och förmåga att analysera och kommunicera hotinformation.
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetsverktyg såsom Trivy, Snyk, SonarQube, Falco eller liknande.



  





**Meriterande** 



* Certifieringar inom området, t.ex. CKS, CISSP eller motsvarande.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med drift är meriterande.



  





**Din ansökan** 




 Ansök med ditt CV och beskriv kort vad du söker i din nästa roll. Vi gör löpande urval och intervjuer så ansök gärna redan idag!
 



  





 Har du frågor är du varmt välkommen att höra av dig till hanna.stockelid@basalt.se
 



  





**Placering och säkerhet** 




 Vi har kontor i centrala Stockholm och i Enköping och du utgår från det kontor som passar dig bäst.
 



  





 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetande. Eftersom våra kunders verksamhet kräver det och flera av våra anställda är placerade i säkerhetsklass, är svenskt medborgarskap ett villkor för att arbeta på Basalt.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 För att ge dig trygghet och stabilitet erbjuder vi ett förmånspaket som inkluderar en av marknadens bästa pensionslösningar, omfattande försäkringar, förstärkt föräldralön och ett generöst friskvårdsbidrag på 5 000 kr/år. Du får även tillgång till Benifex, där du kan hitta extra förmåner och vi erbjuder kontinuerliga möjligheter till kompetensutveckling. Vi erbjuder också tjänstledighet med löneutfyllnad för medarbetare som tjänstgör inom Försvarsmakten, inklusive GSS/T, reservofficerare och hemvärnssoldater.
 



  





 Vi värnar om balansen mellan arbete och fritid. Med flexibla arbetstider, 5-timmars arbetsdag innan helgdagar och ledigt på klämdagar ser vi till att du har tid för både ditt jobb och ditt privatliv. Dessutom anordnar vi gemensamma aktiviteter, såsom skidresor, träningspass samt sociala luncher och frukostar, för att stärka sammanhållningen och göra arbetsplatsen ännu trevligare.
 



  





 Vi strävar efter att du ska känna stolthet och trivsel hos oss på Basalt. Du kan läsa mer om våra förmåner och om hur det är att arbeta på Basalt här!
 



  





**Basalt i korthet:** 



* Grundat 2009, idag ca 150 medarbetare
* Kontor i Stockholm och Enköping
* En del av Omegapoint Group
* Ledande inom säkra it-lösningar och systematiskt säkerhetsarbete
* Värderingar: vass och snäll
* Vision: att vara det självklara valet för ett robust och säkert samhälle



  





 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Software Engineer - Sana
description:
**Your work days are brighter here.**
 We’re obsessed with making hard work pay off, for our people, our customers, and the world around us. As a Fortune 500 company and a leading AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, we’re shaping the future of work so teams can reach their potential and focus on what matters most. The minute you join, you’ll feel it. Not just in the products we build, but in how we show up for each other. Our culture is rooted in integrity, empathy, and shared enthusiasm. We’re in this together, tackling big challenges with bold ideas and genuine care. We look for curious minds and courageous collaborators who bring sun-drenched optimism and drive. Whether you're building smarter solutions, supporting customers, or creating a space where everyone belongs, you’ll do meaningful work with Workmates who’ve got your back. In return, we’ll give you the trust to take risks, the tools to grow, the skills to develop and the support of a company invested in you for the long haul. So, if you want to inspire a brighter work day for everyone, including yourself, you’ve found a match in Workday, and we hope to be a match for you too.
   

  

**About The Team**
 About Sana
   

  

 Sana is an AI lab building superintelligence for work. We believe organizations can accomplish their missions faster when teams can effortlessly access knowledge, automate repetitive work, and learn anything with the help of agentic AI. As part of Workday, we are committed to building AI that augments people - not replaces them.
   

  

 We bring this mission to life through two products. Sana Agents provide a seamless way to access all your company’s apps, knowledge, and data, enabling AI agents to do real work so teams can process and act on information at unprecedented scale. Sana Learn is an AI-powered learning hub that combines the simplicity of a modern learning platform with intelligent features like an AI tutor, automated content generation, and interactive apps, making knowledge not just accessible but actionable.
   

  

 We’re a talent-dense, product-obsessed team of engineers and designers from companies like Google, Spotify, Apple, and Databricks, united by deep technical excellence and rapid iteration. Our tools already help over a million people learn and work better across hundreds of leading enterprises - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

**About The Role**
**About the role**
 Ship customer-facing value quickly in small teams - owning everything from problem definition through UX, API, and instrumentation. You’ll work end-to-end to deliver features that delight users and move the needle for Sana and our customers.
   

  

**In this role, you will**
* Own features from design to deploy - frontend (React/TypeScript), backend (Node/TypeScript) and database (Postgres)
* Integrate with agent and retrieval APIs to deliver seamless product experiences
* Instrument products, run A/B tests, and iterate quickly with design and PM
* Make pragmatic trade-offs and thrive in ambiguous 0→1 product spaces
* Collaborate closely with stakeholders, users and teammates to define and solve the right problems


**About You**
**What success looks like**
* Features ship fast, delight users, and drive measurable impact
* End-to-end ownership is the norm - problems are solved, not handed off
* Product instrumentation and A/B tests inform every iteration
* You are a force multiplier for your squad, making everyone around you better
* Ambiguity is an opportunity, not a blocker


**Our tech stack**
 We build on a simple modern stack optimized for both humans and AI.
   

  

* Backend: TypeScript, Kotlin, Node.js
* Frontend: TypeScript, React, Tailwind
* Databases: Postgres, Redis
* Cloud infra: GCP/Kubernetes/Terraform


**Our Approach to Flexible Work**
 With Flex Work, we’re combining the best of both worlds: in-person time and remote. Our approach enables our teams to deepen connections, maintain a strong community, and do their best work. We know that flexibility can take shape in many ways, so rather than a number of required days in-office each week, we simply
 **spend at least half (50%) of our time each quarter in the office or in the field** 
 with our customers, prospects, and partners (depending on role). This means you'll have the freedom to create a flexible schedule that caters to your business, team, and personal needs, while being intentional to make the most of time spent together. Those in our remote "home office" roles also have the opportunity to come together in our offices for important moments that matter.
   

  

 At Workday, we are committed to providing an accessible and inclusive hiring experience where all candidates can fully demonstrate their skills. If you require assistance or an accommodation at any point, please email accommodations@workday.com.
   

  

**Are you being referred to one of our roles? If so, ask your connection at Workday about our Employee Referral process!**
 At Workday, we value our candidates’ privacy and data security. Workday will never ask candidates to apply to jobs through websites that are not Workday Careers.
   

  

 Please be aware of sites that may ask for you to input your data in connection with a job posting that appears to be from Workday but is not.
   

  

 In addition, Workday will never ask candidates to pay a recruiting fee, or pay for consulting or coaching services, in order to apply for a job at Workday.

title: Head of Container Automation
description:
**Job ID: 2848**
 We are looking for an ambitious leader for Container Automation to Platform Engineering, who will work with other engineering team leads, to build the hearth of our Nordea Internal Delivery Platform. Designing, building and automating our Kubernetes clusters in Nordea. Both on-premise and in our cloud environments.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 Our role is to provide a scalable and secure container platform that seamlessly integrates on-premise and cloud environments, enabling accelerated application deployment and driving business agility across the company.
   

  

 You will be leading a team of highly motivated engineers with devotion to technology and problem solving. The role requires to technically lead a team of senior engineers, while being hands on and develop/engineer yourself. The role also requires you to be able to come up with ideas and continues processes improvements, and improvements for how the team works. The role requires strong communication skills, the ability to create and execute strategy, and problem solving.
   

  

 You as the Leader, play a key role in developing and supporting your team members to reach their aspirations and unleash their full potential.
   

  

 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
 As the Leader for Container Automation, you'll play an important role driving and supporting the Nordea Technology Strategy and journey together with highly skilled colleagues. As a lead you will together with your unit be responsible for building the end-to-end Container orchestration and architecture, which enables Nordea to move towards a more modern automated landscape and ways of working.
   

  

**With focus on:**
* Container orchestration
* Platform Engineering
* Cloud enablers within Kubernetes
* Technology driver and lead
* People leadership and development


**Who You Are**
**This is the right role for you if you have:**
* Ability to lead other people and make them follow towards the common objectives, experience working regularly with stakeholders (management)
* Hands-on experience and understanding the principles behind Container, DevOps, Blueprinting, Development lifecycle and Lean
* Strong knowledge of Container technologies e.g., Kubernetes, docker, ArgoCD, CNI, Ingress/Egress
* Good understanding of automation tools e.g., Tekton, Ansible, Terraform, Packer, AWX
* Good understanding of cloud and on-prem providers e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure, VMWare


**Your background and skills include:**
* You are solution driven
* Self-confident but humble
* Initiative and innovative
* Have passion for automation and providing secure self-service capabilities


**As the Leader you are expected to and have a crucial role in:**
* Creating purpose by translating strategy into operational and actionable plans to showcase how we create value for our customers and impact business priorities.
* Empowering people by identifying individual development opportunities to support growth and encourage them to share own ideas, concerns and learnings.
* Driving performance by recognising individual contributions and collective victories to maintain a healthy balance through measurable goals and clear priorities for each team member.
* Developing teams by nurturing a dynamic team culture, that emphasises trust and respect to ensure that everyone understands their unique value and contribution.
* Fostering inclusion by creating equal opportunity through curiosity about all aspects of diversity in your team to evaluate habits and perspectives on a continuous basis.


**What We Offer**
**People** 
 come here when they want to get somewhere. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

**A culture** 
 that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

**Hybrid working model** 
 – we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusion** 
 are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusio n within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 06/05/2026.
   

  

**The recruitment process consists of the following steps:**
* Preliminary CV selection
* Phone conversation with the recruiter
* Online interview with the hiring leader
* Background check


**We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.**
**We build relationships.** 
 We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

**We learn and develop.** 
 We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

**We lead change.** 
 We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

**We are Nordea.** 
 We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACONordea@nordea.com.

title: Data Engineer Insight
description:
**Data Engineer till Nexer Insight!**
 Vill du vara med och bygga framtidens datalösningar inom AI, machine learning och datalager?
   

  

 Nexer Insight, partner till marknadsledande molnplattformar, där innovation inom data och AI står i fokus, söker nu en Data Engineer som vill bli en del av vårt team. Hos oss får du arbeta i en engagerad och kunnig miljö tillsammans med spännande kunder, i varierande och utmanande uppdrag – samtidigt som du erbjuds goda möjligheter till utveckling och förmåner.
   

  

**Kanske är du vår nästa “Data Ninja”**
 Hos Nexer Insight blir du en viktig del av ett bolag som präglas av entreprenörskap och nytänkande. Hos Nexer Insight, partner med databricks, arbetar vi med den senaste tekniken från Microsoft. Här får du möjlighet att pusha gränserna inom data och molnteknik, experimentera med nya verktyg och omsätta cutting-edge tech till lösningar som skapar verkligt affärsvärde. Här möts data engineering och data science – och du är med och driver lösningar från data till affärsnytta.
   

  

**I rollen som Data Engineer kommer du att:**
* Designa, bygga och vidareutveckla skalbara och högpresterande datalösningar
* Arbeta end-to-end med moderna dataplattformar, datamodeller och pipelines
* Samarbeta nära kunder och omsätta affärsbehov till smarta tekniska lösningar
* Säkerställa robust arkitektur med fokus på datakvalitet, tillförlitlighet och prestanda
* Jobba i framkant med den senaste tekniken inom Data och Analytics
* Arbeta med datainhämtning, transformation och lagring
* Vara med och driva våra kunders resa mot datadrivna arbetssätt genom innovativa molnlösningar


**Vi tror att du:**
* Har stark erfarenhet av att arbeta med molnplattformar som Azure, AWS eller GCP
* Har flera års hands-on erfarenhet av ETL och dataintegration, exempelvis med Azure Data Factory, Databricks/Fabric, DBT eller Snowflake
* Är van vid att arbeta med moderna dataplattformar som Data Lakes eller Lakehouse-arkitektur
* Har mycket goda kunskaper i SQL och trivs med att jobba nära data
* Har erfarenhet av informationsmodellering och dimensionell modellering
* Har god förståelse för DevOps-principer, versionshantering i Git och CI/CD-flöden
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på både svenska och engelska


***Det är meriterande om du även har erfarenhet av:***
* Modernisering av dataplattformar
* Tabular-modeller och DAX
* Data Vault-modellering
* Att sätta upp infrastruktur i Azure, AWS eller GCP

title: Microsoft Azure Cloud Architect
description:
*Är du en erfaren konsult som brinner för att skapa välfungerande och optimerade molnlösningar? Vill du vara med och skapa framtidens digitalisering med hjälp av Cloud? Hos oss på Accigo får du vara med och stärka cloudaffären samtidigt som du utvecklar ditt självledarskap genom frihet under ansvar.*
 Vem är du?
   

  

 Vi vill jobba med dig som vill vara med och bygga branschens starkaste affär och team inom Azure cloud consulting. Du drivs av teknisk utveckling samtidigt som du är en stjärna på att kommunicera på ett enkelt språk med kunder och kollegor. Du är lyhörd för kundens nuvarande behov och vågar samtidigt utmana befintliga arbetssätt och lösningar.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har
   

  

* Flerårig erfarenhet av design och implementation av lösningar i Azure, inklusive god kännedom om Microsoft well architected framework & Cloud adoption framework.
* Du har jobbat med on premises- eller hybrida system.
* Du är bevandrad inom agilt arbetssätt och har stor kunskap av DevOps.
* Kompetens inom Infrastructure as code (IaC) & PowerShell/CLI
* Du har viss erfarenhet av att designa nätverk och tillhörande komponenter, i Azure och OnPrem.
* Du har erfarenhet inom kravinsamling och presale-arbete
* Mycket god kommunikationsförmåga och förmågan att leda ditt projekt och dig själv.
* Gedigen erfarenhet som konsult där du jobbat med medelstora och stora bolag.


 Ett plus om du har
   

  

* Du har erfarenhet att vårda kundrelationer och driva säljprocesser
* Erfarenhet av andra publika molntjänster
* Microsoft Certifikat: AZ-104, AZ-305 och AZ-400
* IT-Arkitektcertifiering från Dataföreningen eller liknade instans.
* Erfarenhet av Cisco och Ubiquitinätverkstekniker


 Detta kommer du att göra
   

  

 Vi arbetar med att möjliggöra våra kunders digitalseringsresor genom att vara djupt tekniska specialister på kundens teknikplattformar, med utgångspunkt i Microsofts ekosystem. Du kommer jobba med kunder som behöver hjälp att flytta upp sina On Premis miljöer till Azure. Du kommer att designa lösningarna utifrån kundens krav och Microsoft well architected framework. Samt hjälpa till att implementera lösningarna.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt på gemensamma teamleveranser och vi samarbetar ofta med andra team på Accigo. Därför är det viktigt att du trivs med att jobba tillsammans med andra och samtidigt tar ansvar för din egen leverans.
   

  

 I din roll som Cloud-arkitekt kommer du att agera lösningsarkitekt i våra kunduppdrag, hjälpa till med införsäljning, genomföra externa och interna kompetensutvecklingsinitiativ, design och uppsättning av Azurelösningar, samt hands-on och problemlösning. Du förväntas driva uppdrag och ta stort eget ansvar i dina projekt. Du kommer med din kompetens och branscherfarenhet vara en mycket viktig länk mellan affärsverksamhet och IT-infrastrukturen i Azure.
   

  

 Vårt team
   

  

 Vi är ett nyfiket och samarbetsvilligt team, med ett gemensamt brinnande intresse för teknik och digitalisering. Vi ser oss som Sveriges vassaste (och gladaste) team inom våra fokusområden, och har en långsiktig strategi att växa och bli fler. Vi arbetar dagligen med varandra, både i kundleveranser och med erbjudandeutveckling och att driva våra fokusområden.
   

  

 Förutom att arbeta tillsammans bjuder vi även in till frukostar där vi delar med oss av pinsamheter och udda fakta, kompetensspridning, veckovisa team-träffar och spontana fikastunder. Vi strävar efter att skapa en vardag fylld med spännande projekt och möjligheter hos kund, samt glädje, energi och gemenskap i teamet där dina idéer får ta plats.
   

  

 Kompensation och förmåner
   

  

 Vår förmånspolicy är utvecklad för att möta både dina professionella och personliga behov. I vårt omfattande förmånspaket ingår friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension och frivillig sjukvårdsförsäkring. Vår ersättningsmodell består av en konkurrenskraftig fast del och en rörlig del som ger dig möjlighet att påverka din lön baserat på din prestation och ambition. Vi erbjuder både professionell och personlig utveckling.
   

  

 Har du några frågor eller är du bara nyfiken? Vi berättar gärna mer om oss över en kaffe:
 *tyra.drakenberg@accigo.se*
 Accigo är ett konsultbolag som hjälper företag och organisationer med digital affärs- och verksamhetsutveckling med tekniken som möjliggörare. För oss handlar digitalisering till 90% om människor och 10% om teknik. Det är när samspelet mellan människa och teknik fungerar som digitaliseringens fulla styrka visar sig.
   

  

 För många handlar digitalisering mest om teknik. För oss är det så otroligt mycket större. Digitalisering kan få både människor och organisationer att våga sikta högre, följa sina drömmar och öppna dörrar som de inte ens visste fanns. Och när man ser igenom tekniken och börjar skönja vilka möjligheter som gömmer sig där bakom. Då ser man att framtiden kan vara en fantastisk plats – fylld av mänsklig energi och värme – och digitalisering är inget annat än vår superkraft för att komma dit.

title: Staff ML Scientist
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
* Design, develop, and deploy scalable machine learning products with a focus on online prediction.
* Build and maintain infrastructure and tooling as a platform for data scientists.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate ML solutions into production systems.
* Monitor and maintain the performance and reliability of ML models post-deployment.
* Stay current with the latest advancements in machine learning and related technologies.


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Required: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. Comfortable work with multi-cloud setup and experience with AWS or/and GCP and containerized environment like Kubernetes. Solid understanding of machine learning lifecycle and fundamentals. Expertise in Python. Familiarity with Terraform, GitHub and GitHub Actions. Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Bonus Qualifications: Experience with Vertex AI, specifically in online prediction. Experience with Cloud Run and Workload Identity Federation. Experience with kubeflow pipelines Experience with Triton inference server and TensorRT Understanding of data security and privacy regulations.
   

  

**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Client Manager - Hunter som driver tillväxt i Sogeti Big Cities
description:
På Sogeti tror vi att det bästa finns inom oss alla. Oavsett om du är i början av din karriär eller redan på toppen av ditt spel, kommer vi att uppmuntra dig att nå din fulla potential och bli bättre. Genom vår gemensamma passion för teknik, vår entreprenöriella kultur och vårt fokus på kontinuerligt lärande, kommer vi att ge dig allt du behöver för att göra ditt bästa arbete och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.
   

  

 Long Description
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vi söker dig som drivs av att öppna dörrar, bygga förtroende och skapa affärsvärde där det tidigare inte finns något. I denna position kliver du in i en säljroll med stort fokus på vår nykundsbearbetning. Vi söker dig som har en del erfarenhet redan men vill ta nästa steg i karriären och bli en del av vårt team i rollen som Client Manager. Vi vill förstärka vårt team både i Stockholm och i Malmö. Här får du möjlighet att vara del i ett diversifierat team inom det vi kallar Sogeti Big Cities som fokuserar på vår storstäder Stockholm, Göteborg och Malmö. Du finns således i någon av dessa städer med närhet till kunderna och gärna ett etablerat nätverk.
   

  

 I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:
   

  

* Driva, leda och utveckla vår nykundsbeabetning – från prospektering till etablering av relation och affärer.
* Utveckla helt nya kundrelationer till långsiktiga partnerskap där vi blir kundens självklara leverantör och rådgivare.
* Utveckla våra affärsmodeller inom försäljning av teamleverans och portföljtjänster.
* Arbeta nära våra leveransteam för att ta fram skräddarsydda lösningar baserade på kundens behov.
* Representera Sogeti i externa sammanhang såsom branschevent och nätverksträffar.


**Din profil**
* Du har minst 5 års erfarenhet av försäljning inom IT-branschen samt så har du erfarenhet från en eller fler av dessa branscher; Tillverkande industri, High Tech, Bank och Försäkring.
* Du är en utpräglad hunter med erfarenhet av att utveckla helt nya kundrealtioner och får dem att utvecklas tillsammans med kunden och vår organisation.
* Du har erfarenhet av konsultsälj samt tjänstebaserade IT-lösningar och olika typer av teamleveranser med värde i fokus.
* Du är kund och affärsdriven i allt du gör samt kommunikativ med god förståelse för teknikens roll i affärsutveckling.
* Du behärskar datadrivet arbete i CRM och andra säljstödsystem, där AI hjälper dig att bli en bättre säljare genom att prioritera leads, optimera pipeline och identifera nästa steg.
* Du behärskar svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift.


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas:**
 Next Generation: Vi jobbar för att utveckla nästa generations säljare där AI är en del av det naturliga i säljarbetet för att ge oss insikter, förstärka oss och ta bättre beslut.
   

  

 Innovativ miljö: Hos oss får du chansen att jobba med den senaste tekniken och vara en del av ett dynamiskt team som älskar att skapa värde genom innovation.
   

  

 Karriärutveckling: Vi bryr oss om din framtid och erbjuder utvecklingsprogram och certifieringar i de senaste teknologierna, så att du kan växa och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.
   

  

 Flexibelt arbete: Vi förstår att livet är mer än bara jobb. Därför erbjuder vi möjligheter till distansarbete och flexibla arbetstider för att du ska må bra och trivas
   

  

 Teamkänsla: Vi är som en stor familj med en härlig teamkänsla. Genom att leva efter våra värdeord som mod, passion, laganda och entreprenörskap - skapar vi en arbetsmiljö där alla kan trivas.
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Vi välkomnar varmt din ansökan redan idag — urval sker löpande.
   

  

 Har du frågor om tjänsten eller rekryteringsprocessen, vänligen kontakta Mattias Bergströmner på mattias.bergströmner@sogeti.se.
   

  

*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID‑kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*
 Om Sogeti
   

  

 Sogeti Sverige, en del av Capgemini-koncernen, med 19 kontor och 1200 medarbetare, skapar affärsvärde med teknologi för organisationer som behöver införa innovation snabbt och som vill ha en lokal partner med global skalbarhet. Med en hands-on-kultur och närhet till kunderna, implementerar Sogeti lösningar som hjälper organisationer att arbeta snabbare, bättre och smartare. Genom att kombinera agilitet och snabb implementation via en DevOps-ansats, levererar Sogeti innovativa lösningar inom test- och kvalitetssäkring, molnet och systemutveckling, förstärkta av AI, data och automation.

title: Test Manager - Software, Bus development
description:
Scania is undergoing a transformation from being a leading supplier of trucks, buses, and engines to providing complete and sustainable transport solutions. Together with TRATON and our sister brands MAN, Volkswagen Truck & Bus, and International, we are working to shape the future of mobility with innovative and environmentally conscious solutions.
   

  

 Our values – customer first, respect, team spirit, responsibility, and elimination of waste – are at the heart of everything we do. Together, we are at the forefront of creating a sustainable future.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 As a Test Manager – Software, bus development, you will play a key role in ensuring high-quality, predictable, and safe software deliveries within vehicle systems. Acting as the central link between development, testing, integration, and release, you create structure and transparency in a complex and fast-moving software environment.
   

  

 The role combines technical expertise with leadership and requires strong cross-functional coordination, along with a clear focus on quality, traceability, and risk management. You will own the end-to-end test strategy and be a trusted advisor in releasing readiness decisions.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
* Define, own, and continuously evolve the end‑to‑end test strategy for software components, systems, and vehicle functions
* Plan and coordinate test activities across SIL, HIL, test rigs, and vehicles, ensuring alignment with agile release cycles
* Ensure strong requirements traceability, supporting development teams in requirement interpretation and identifying gaps or risks
* Drive and support test automation and integration of tests into CI/CD pipelines, with an emphasis on efficient regression handling
* Lead analysis and resolution of defects, risks, and deviations, including root‑cause investigations and go/no‑go recommendations
* Ensure compliance with ASPICE, ISO 26262, and cybersecurity standards, including coordination of safety‑related testing
* Communicate test status, quality metrics, and risk assessments clearly to program management and stakeholders
* Identify bottlenecks and drive continuous process and methodology improvements within testing and validation
* Participate in discussions related to test vehicle specifications, ensuring correct setup and future readiness


**Who You Are**
 You have a strong technical academic background, preferably a master's degree (or equivalent) in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics, Engineering Physics, or Systems Science.
   

  

 We believe that you have previous experience in roles such as Test Manager, Test Lead, Verification Lead, Release Manager, or Software Quality role, and good understanding of modern development methods, including Agile frameworks (Scrum/SAFe), CI/CD, DevOps, Git, and model‑based development.
   

  

 You also have…
   

  

  

* Solid experience from automotive software development, verification, or validation within areas such as ADAS, powertrain/EV, infotainment, telematics, or vehicle electrical architecture.
* Hands-on knowledge of test methodologies and automation, for example SIL/HIL, rig testing, system and integration testing, scripting with Python or Robot Framework
* Familiarity with industry standards such as ISO 26262, ASPICE, and automotive cybersecurity (ISO/SAE 21434)


 As a person, we believe that you…
   

  

  

* Have the ability to lead and coordinate cross‑functional technical teams in complex development environments
* Are structured, analytical, and data‑driven, with the confidence to make and communicate clear decisions
* Have strong capability to manage priorities, dependencies, and risks across parallel development tracks
* Have a collaborative mindset with strong communication skills and a focus on continuous improvement


 If you don’t match all qualifications above, you may still be a great fit - let us know in your application how your experience and attitude make you the right person for the role!
   

  

**This Is Us**
 At Scania Bus, we develop sustainable, innovative and reliable transport solutions that move people and societies forward. Our engineering culture is built on openness, diversity, and respect for the individual. As our industry evolves, we continuously learn, challenge ourselves, and develop the next generation of buses together.
   

  

**Who Am I As a Leader**
*My leadership is based on trust, respect, and responsibility. I believe in setting clear goals — the what and the why — while giving you support and guidance along the way.*
*I encourage open dialogue, honesty and shared decision‑making, and I strongly believe in teamwork — within our group, across People Transport Solutions and throughout Scania and TRATON.*
*My goal is to create an environment where you feel supported, included, and able to grow. If this role excites you, I encourage you to apply — even if you don’t tick every box. We will coach and support you to reach what’s needed.*
 — Ingvar Selander, Group Manager
   

  

**Scania Offers**
 We offer a dynamic, flexible workplace with hybrid work options, including Scania Sergel and Midway hubs. With a structured development plan and courses, Scania supports your career growth both locally and internationally.
   

  

 Benefits include training at our health center Gröndal or wellness allowance, result bonus, flexible hours, and company car leasing. Scania also hosts events for employees and their families, and Stockholm residents enjoy direct access to Södertälje via Scania Job express buses for an easy commute to Södertälje.
   

  

**Application**
 We look forward to receiving your application, consisting of your CV, and kindly ask you not to share a cover letter to ensure an efficient and unbiased recruitment process for all parties.
   

  

 Apply as soon as possible, no later than 2026-05-05. Screening will take place on an ongoing basis during the application period. Logical and personality tests may be used as part of the selection process, and a background check may be required for this role.
   

  

 If you have questions or would like more information, please contact:
   

  

 Ingvar Selander, Unit Head, ingvar.selander@scania.com
   

  

 We look forward to your application!

title: Android Software Engineer
description:
**Job Description**

 Are you passionate about creating impactful
 **Mobile experiences on Android** 
 ? We’re looking for a talented and motivated
 **Mid level Android Software Engineer** 
 to join our team and help shape the future of our mobile products.
   

  





 In this role, you’ll be at the heart of product development, collaborating closely with Product Managers, Engineering Managers, and cross-functional teams. You’ll play a key role in translating business needs into high-quality Android solutions, all while adhering to industry best practices and maintaining clean, scalable code.
   

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO** 
  

  




* Design, develop, and maintain high-quality Android applications using Kotlin and/or Java.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and deliver new features that enhance user experience.
* Write clean, efficient, and testable code following modern Android development best practices.
* Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and Agile ceremonies to ensure quality and alignment.
* Debug, troubleshoot, and optimize performance of existing applications to ensure reliability and responsiveness.
* Stay up to date with the latest Android trends, tools, and technologies, and apply them to improve development workflows.
* Ensure applications meet security standards and follow modern compliance practices.
* Contribute to improving internal development processes, tooling, and documentation for better team efficiency.



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH** 
  

  





 Our product teams are dedicated to building advanced internal tools that support data-driven decision-making across product development. We focus on analyzing test variations, interpreting performance data, and delivering insights that help product teams optimize feature rollouts. By collaborating closely with cross-functional teams, we ensure that new features are launched efficiently and effectively. Through continuous learning and iteration, we contribute to innovation and excellence in user experience across the organization.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE**




 We are looking for people with...
   

  




* Professional experience in
 **Android development** 
 . Proficiency in Kotlin (Java is a plus).
* Experience with
 **Jetpack Compose** 
 .
* Solid understanding of Android SDK, Material Design, and Jetpack components.
* Experience working with RESTful APIs, third-party libraries, and JSON.
* Familiarity with Android architectural patterns (e.g., MVVM, Clean Architecture).
* Experience with version control systems, especially Git.
* Knowledge of dependency injection frameworks (e.g., Hilt, Dagger).
* Understanding mobile app performance, memory management, and debugging tools.
* Familiarity with testing frameworks (e.g., JUnit, Espresso).
* Ability to work in an agile development environment.



 Nice to Have
   

  




* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines for Android.
* Exposure to mobile analytics tools (e.g., Firebase, Mixpanel).
* Published apps in the Google Play Store.



 And people who have:
   

  




* **Problem-Solving Skills** 
 : A logical and creative mindset to tackle challenges and deliver effective solutions, even under pressure.
* **Collaborative Spirit** 
 : The ability to work seamlessly with cross-functional teams including designers, product managers, and backend developers.
* **Interpersonal Communication** 
 : A clear and thoughtful approach to articulating ideas, technical concepts, and feedback, both in writing and verbally.
* **Adaptability** 
 : Comfort with navigating change, learning new tools, and adjusting to evolving project needs.
* **Growth Mindset** 
 : Openness to feedback and a drive to continuously improve and grow professionally.



**WHO WE ARE** 
  

  





 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE** 
  

  





 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe.
   

  




* **Staff discount card** 
 : Usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online.
* **H&M Incentive Program (HIP)** 
 : Included in our HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
* **Competitive pensions** 
 : Collective Agreement and ITP pensions competitive to the Swedish market.
* **Generous vacation** 
 : 30 days' vacation, health care allowance, and good work-life balance.
* **Additional perks** 
 : Discounts from Benify.
* **Innovative Environment** 
 : Work with cutting-edge technology and innovative solutions.
* **Global Impact** 
 : Be part of a team that influences users worldwide.
* **Professional Growth** 
 : Endless opportunities to learn and develop your skills.
* **Collaborative Culture** 
 : Join a motivated team that values collaboration and excellence.



**JOIN US** 
  

  





 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





 This is a full-time permanent position, starting as soon as possible according to the agreement. The role is a hybrid position, based in our office in Stockholm, Sweden.
   

  





 Apply by sending in your
 **CV in English** 
 as soon as possible. Due to data policies, we only accept applications through the career page.
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here. We are eager to meet you!
   

  





 \*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.

title: Dotnet Developer
description:
**Role: .Net Developer Consultant** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden** 




**Type: Contract** 




  





**Job Description:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
* Professional experience in software development using .NET technologies, with strong proficiency in C#, ASP.NET, and .NET Core.
* Strong backend development experience with the ability to design and build scalable and efficient systems.
* Solid understanding of design patterns and SOLID principles.
* Exposure to modern AI tools and platforms (e.g., code assistants, API-based AI integrations, or similar technologies).
* Good understanding of relational databases and hands-on experience with SQL.
* Experience with cloud platforms, particularly for building and deploying applications.
* Familiarity with RESTful APIs and microservices architecture.
* Understanding of data warehousing concepts such as data lakes, data processing, and analytical systems.
* Knowledge of data validation and quality assurance practices to ensure data accuracy and reliability.
* Experience with version control systems and Agile development methodologies.
* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues.
* Interest in staying current with emerging technologies and software development trends.
* Effective communication skills and the ability to collaborate in a team environment.



  





**Preferred Skills** 



* Relevant cloud or development certifications.
* Familiarity with reporting and data visualization tools.
* Exposure to serverless computing and event-driven architectures.
* Experience with NoSQL databases.
* Understanding of authentication and authorization mechanisms (e.g., OAuth, token-based authentication).
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices.
* Experience with cross-platform or cross-cloud system integration.

title: Account Manager (AM)/ Key Account Manager (KAM)
description:
As of 2 September 2025, Vivicta, former Tietoevry Tech Services, now operates as a standalone company under our new brand. We’ve officially launched Vivicta, your trusted Nordic transformation partner, making everyday easier through technology. You can explore more about our brand and what we stand for at https://www.vivicta.com
  

  

Ready to join us? Click ‘Apply’ and complete our short application form to get started. Prefer another option? Apply via LinkedIn to automatically populate your details using your profile.


Do you love winning new business, growing client relationships and working close to technology? At Vivicta, we’re looking for an AM/KAM/SM who wants to make a real impact.


**When you join Vivicta as an Account Manager (AM)/ Key Account Manager (KAM)**

This is a hands‑on, quota‑carrying sales leadership role where you work as an individual contributor with strong drive and energy to win new client logos and grow existing smaller accounts. You have clear ownership of revenue, pipeline and client relationships, and operate with a strong commercial mindset.


You will act as an ambassador for Vivicta towards assigned clients and external stakeholders, demonstrating a high level of accountability, ownership and professionalism throughout the entire sales cycle. Success in the role is measured through clear KPIs, including sales bookings (closed value) and pipeline creation on both quarterly and yearly basis.


Typical work week – How are you expected to manage time


**Client** **‑facing activities** - Client meetings, presentations and workshops 50–60%


**External stakeholders** - Partner companies, influencers and ecosystem collaboration 5–10%


**Internal collaboration** - Close collaboration with practice, delivery and solution teams 25–30%


**Learning and enablement** - Trainings, certifications and self‑learning 5%


**Internal reporting & governance** - CRM usage, sales operations and reviews 5%  

  



**Who we are looking for**

Experience wise, we believe you have:


* At least 5–6 years of experience in a client‑facing sales role (e.g. Account Manager, Sales Manager, Client Executive), working with mid‑to‑large sized clients in Sweden. Candidates with longer experience are also welcome.
* Strong experience selling Enterprise IT solutions and services across industries, with familiarity in ERP, CRM and Commerce solutions, as well as a solid understanding of datacentre services and cloud platforms such as AWS and Microsoft Azure.
* Proven track record of owning the full sales cycle, closing IT contracts typically in the range of EUR 2–10 million per year.
* Experience selling to senior IT and business stakeholders, independently leading client meetings, presentations and requirement discussions.
* Experience acting as SPOC (Single Point of Contact) towards clients, while collaborating closely with internal teams on workshops, proposals, contracts and commercial discussions.
* Structured way of working with sales tools and CRM systems for account, contact, lead and opportunity management.
* Experience working with global or regionally distributed teams, across different cultures and nationalities.

Qualifications and other requirements


* Bachelor’s degree; additional IT‑related training or certifications are considered a plus.
* Knowledge of Manufacturing, Retail, Energy, Transportation industry(s) is considered a plus.
* Very good English skills, spoken and written. Swedish language skills are highly desirable.
Strong PowerPoint skills, with the ability to create and deliver winning sales pitches.  
* 

As a person, we believe you are:


* A relationship‑driven individual who builds strong relationships with stakeholders and establishes trust
* Curious and inquisitive, not afraid to ask questions and challenge assumptions
* A lifelong learner who is proactive and truly lives by client centricity
* Has a genuine interest in technology / IT from a user perspective and actively follows new developments and emerging IT solutions
* Very strong communication skills, able to interact effectively with all types of stakeholders
A strong team player who enjoys collaboration and contributes positively to the team  
* 

**Location:** Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö  

  



**We offer you:**

We offer you professional growth, meaningful projects, an open culture, and an exceptional work–life balance! We provide you with the opportunity to help shape the future of a rapidly growing and important sector. We believe that our organizational culture is a key factor in your success. As part of our culture and our way of working, we offer a flexible hybrid work model. We also believe in curiosity and continuous learning as a way of life, where you reskill and grow every day as new opportunities arise.  

  



**How to apply:**  

*We look forward to your application!*  

*Please attach your CV in English or LinkedIn-profile and we will reach out to you. Interviews will be held on a continuous basis, so we encourage you to apply today.*

*Hope to hear from you soon!*

*Vivicta declines calls from recruitment companies.*

*We conduct background checks for all final candidates, and some roles may require security clearance during hiring or later—always handled within local legislation and with care and confidentiality.*

title: Data Center Facilities Technician, Electrical
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Associate's degree, trade school certification, or other certified training in a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of electrical experience (e.g., electrical testing equipment or electrical distribution) in an industrial or commercial environment.
* Ability to participate in material handling tasks such as lifting, carrying or moving up to 50 lbs (23 kg) of equipment, required use of safety equipment such as limited weight bearing work platforms, ladders, step stools and personal protective equipment (PPE) like safety harnesses in accordance with safety and ergonomic guidelines and assessments.
* Ability to work non-standard hours and work rotations/shifts.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* 5 years of experience in maintenance of electrical distribution systems or construction/technical environment or a related field.
* Experience in data centers, hospitals, or power plants.
* Knowledge of electrical systems used in a data center environment (e.g., Feeders, Transformers, Generators, Switchgear, UPS systems, ATS/STS units, PDU/PMM units).
* Knowledge of meters, devices, sensors, and troubleshooting utilizing standard hand tools, digital metering, or calibration/diagnostic equipment.
* Ability to communicate with contractors who perform maintenance or upgrade work on the data center systems.

**About the job**
-----------------


The Data Center team designs and operates some of the most sophisticated electrical engineering, mechanical engineering and HVAC systems in the world. Facilities Technicians at Google data centers operate, monitor and support physical facilities conditions. Some of these duties will include heating and cooling of air and water, power supply, generators, UPS systems, electrical distribution and control and monitoring systems. You regularly help inspect, maintain and repair various data center systems such as piping and non-critical electrical or mechanical system components).  

  

As an advocate for best practices, you develop creative approaches to reducing operational costs while improving overall data center efficiency. You ensure that environmental and safety standards are consistently met, identifying problems and making repairs quickly. In emergency situations or abnormal conditions, you manage data center performance issues and outages to minimize the recovery time from failures.

  


As a Facilities Technician, you will operate, monitor, and support physical facilities conditions for our data centers.

  

The AI and Infrastructure team is redefining what’s possible. We empower Google customers with breakthrough capabilities and insights by delivering AI and Infrastructure at unparalleled scale, efficiency, reliability and velocity. Our customers include Googlers, Google Cloud customers, and billions of Google users worldwide.


We're the driving channel behind Google's groundbreaking innovations, empowering the development of our cutting-edge AI models, delivering unparalleled computing power to global services, and providing the essential platforms that enable developers to build the future. From software to hardware our teams are shaping the future of world-leading hyperscale computing, with key teams working on the development of our TPUs, Vertex AI for Google Cloud, Google Global Networking, Data Center operations, systems research, and much more.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Inspect, maintain, and repair various data center systems.
* Provide daily assistance to technicians by reading blueprints, schematics, and sequence of operations, conduct system tours, and assess their working order.
* Manage the uptime and maintenance of UPS, generators, electrical distribution, and control and monitoring systems.
* Operate, monitor, maintain, and respond to abnormal conditions in the data center facilities systems and equipment.
* Support startup, commissioning, and integration of new electrical equipment and systems into facilities infrastructure.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: ISV & CCSP Business Development Red Hat
description:
**Position:**  

ISV CCSP Business Development Red Hat
  
  

**Job Description:**  

Role Summary
  
The ISV CCSP Business Development Lead is responsible fordriving ecosystem‑led growth through Independent Software Vendors (ISVs) and Cloud Solution Providers (CCSPs).
  
This role builds, scales, and monetizespartner‑led routes to market for AI, Hybrid Cloud, and Subscription Software solutions, with a strong focus onco‑creation, co‑selling, and consumption‑based business models.
  
The role sits at the intersection oftechnology strategy, partner alliances, and revenue growth, working closely with Sales, Product, Consulting, and Partner organizations.
  
  

Key Objectives
  
  

* Acceleratesoftware and AI revenue via ISV and CCSP channels
* Build scalableco‑sell and co‑build motions
* Expand consumption‑based and subscription business models
* Position the company as thepreferred platform partner for ecosystem growth


Key Responsibilities
  
ISV Ecosystem Development
  
  

* Identify, recruit, and developstrategic ISV partners aligned to:
* AI GenAI
* Hybrid Cloud
* Data, Automation, Security, Industry solutions
* Define joint value propositions and solution integrations
* Drive technical and commercial onboarding of ISVs
* Support marketplace enablement and listing strategies


CCSP Cloud Partner Growth
  
  

* Develop and manage relationships withCCSPs and MSPs
* Enable partners to sell, manage, and support:
* Subscription software
* Consumption‑based AI services
* Hybrid cloud platforms
* Align partner offerings with customer FinOps, governance, and compliance needs


Go‑to‑Market Co‑Sell Execution
  
  

* Design and executejoint go‑to‑market plans
* Drive pipeline creation through:
* Co‑selling with direct sales teams
* Partner‑led demand generation
* Support large, complex enterprise deals involving:
* Hybrid cloud
* AI platforms
* Subscription licensing


Commercial Business Model Innovation
  
  

* Shape modern partner business models including:
* SaaS and subscription licensing
* Usage‑based pricing
* Revenue sharing and consumption economics
* Work with legal, finance, and operations to operationalise agreements
* Ensure commercial scalability and profitability


Internal External Stakeholder Management
  
  

* Act as a trusted advisor to:
* Sales leadership
* Product management
* Consulting and delivery teams
* Represent the company in partner forums, industry events, and executive briefings
* Influence roadmap and investment priorities through ecosystem insight


Required Experience Skills
  
Experience
  
  

* 8–12 years in:
* Business development
* Partner alliances
* Ecosystem or channel roles
* Proven experience working with:
* ISVs
* Cloud providers
* SaaS and subscription software models
* Strong background in enterprise technology (AI, cloud, data, security, automation)
* Track record of buildingpartner‑led revenue streams


Skills Capabilities
  
  

* Strong commercial acumen and deal‑shaping skills
* Ability to translate technology platforms intopartner value propositions
* Deep understanding of:
* Hybrid cloud architectures
* AI platform economics
* Subscription and consumption licensing
* Comfortable engaging at:
* C‑suite level
* Technical architect level
* Strong matrix leadership and influence without authority


Preferred / Differentiating Experience
  
  

* Experience with:
* AI platforms and GenAI
* Kubernetes / OpenShift ecosystems
* Cloud marketplaces
* Knowledge of regulated industries:
* Financial services
* Public sector
* Telco / utilities
* Experience operating inEMEA or Nordics partner ecosystems
* Familiarity with FinOps, ITAM, and governance‑driven buying motions


Success Measures (KPIs)
  
  

* Partner‑sourced and partner‑influenced revenue
* Growth in subscription and consumption‑based bookings
* Number and quality of active ISV and CCSP partnerships
* Pipeline creation and co‑sell win rates
* Time‑to‑value for new partner onboardings


Why This Role Matters
  
  

**This role is critical to shifting the business from:**  

* Direct sales →ecosystem‑led growth
* Per‑license selling →subscription consumption models
* Standalone products →platform‑based solutions


The successful candidate will help definehow the company scales AI and hybrid cloud through partners, not just how it sells software.
  
  

#LI-EK2
  
  

**Location:**  

SE-Sweden - Remote
  
  

**Time Type:**  

Full time
  
  

**Job Category:**  

Engineering and Technology
